stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(o)305: Oh... um... I usually like eggs, but this one looks evil.$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(o)403: *crunch*... Mmm... Nuts. That hits the spot. Thanks, @!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(o)442: Mmm... Duck egg... Rich and creamy. *crack*... *slurp*. Ahhhh...
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(o)928: Hehe... Keep giving me these every day, and I'll be able to retire at thirty!$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(o)book: Aw, yeah... I've been looking for this one. It's supposed to be full of tips for bulking up. Rule number one... Eat a ton of eggs! Hah, no problem! Thanks!$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(tr)fro: Umm... I know I'm pretty big on eggs... But this isn't what I meant...$s#$b#Oh well... Down the hatch! *gulp*$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_(tr)par: Can you eat this?$s#$b#I guess there's only one way to find out...
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_negativ: Uhhh... Reading? Yeah, um... I guess I can give it a try.$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.acceptgift_positiv: $c 0.8#Hey, thanks. Eggs are great for bulking up.#*crack*... *sluuurp*... Mmmm. Now that's what I call a snack.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.breakup: You're giving me wha...?$7#$b#*huff*... Got it. Alright... well, you've made your choice. You're not gonna see me begging.$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.cc_bridge: Have you been up by the lake recently? I was on a run late last night, and I noticed that the old bridge was repaired...
stardewcraft.npc.alex.dating_alex: %Alex gives your arm a squeeze, grinning.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.dating_alex_memory: Well, this is a %season I'll never forget!$l
stardewcraft.npc.alex.divorced: I thought we had something special... I guess I was wrong.$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_beach1: Of course you do. If you didn't I'd think you were crazy. Or some kind of nerd.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_beach2: Really? You must be some kind of weirdo.$a#$b#Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_books1: No, I'm not! You're just trying to flatter me.$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_books3: You were supposed to disagree with me.$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_box1: Yes... I know. That's why I've been so determined to be successful with my sports stuff...$9#$b#Make it or not... As long as I try my hardest I think she'd be proud. Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_box2: Wow... It's the anniversary of my Mom's death! Have a heart...$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_box3: ...Thanks, @.#$b#You... you're different than the other guys. More sensitive.$l^You've become my best friend in the whole town... #$b#I'm glad.^Is that embarrassing to say?$l
stardewcraft.npc.alex.event_box4: That doesn't make me feel any better, jerk.$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.eventseen_288847: Uh... I'm not used to opening up like that...$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.eventseen_288847_m: Hey... uh... @? I... feel a lot more 'at peace' after talking to you on the beach last week.$s#$b#Thanks for listening to me.$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_1: Sure, it's getting colder... But it's still warm enough for sports!#$e#That's all I care about.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_fri: I'm going to do two hundred sit-ups tonight.#$b#I'm pretty dedicated, aren't I?$h#$e#Need anything else?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_fri6: I'm going to do a ton of sit-ups tonight.#$e#You have to work really hard if you want to achieve your maximum potential.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_mon: My grandma told me I should spend more time studying.#$e#I was like, '...Grams, don't fret. I'm turning pro!'$h#$e#Studying is for nerds, anyway.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_mon4: My grandma told me I should spend more time studying.#$e#Maybe she's right...$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_sat: I think you can find salmon in the river this time of year.#$e#At least that's what I heard.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_sun: Hey, the gridball game is on today!#$e#Sundays are pretty awesome in the fall.$u
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_thu: What's up?#$e#Isn't your name, like, %firstnameletter%name, or something?#$e#Oh. It's @? Okay. Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_wed: Hey, I want to ask you something.^Hey, can I ask you something?#$e#$q 54/55 fall_Wed_01_old#Do you think the ladies like my haircut?^What do you think about my haircut?#$r 54 30 fall_Wed_01_01#It looks very fashionable.#$r 55 -30 fall_Wed_01_02#It looks like some kind of fungal growth.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_wed8: I finally took the plunge... I've decided to stop putting gel in my hair.#$e#I wouldn't want to be friends with someone who only liked me because I have gel in my hair.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_wed_01_01: Yeah, I know. That's why I have it like this.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_wed_01_02: Yeah right. You're just jealous that I look so good.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fall_wed_01_old: I put too much gel in my hair today. It kind of hurts.#$e#Don't touch it!#$e#...what?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.firstvisit_bathhou: I saw you checking out the bath house the other day. Trying to get in shape? Heh.#$e#Uh... you didn't go poking around in my locker, did you?$9
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fishcaught_139: I saw you catch that salmon.#$b#If you happen to make a 'salmon dinner' out of it, let me have a bite!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fishcaught_159: Heard you caught some kind of rare fish?#$b#I'm impressed. Your arms must be stronger than they look! *pinch* ... not bad!$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.flowerdance_accept: You beat me to it! I was about to ask you...$h#$e#I'll see you out there.
Okay, this should be fun... I hope I can remember the moves this year! It's been a while...$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.flowerdance_declin: Nah... I'm gonna ask someone else. Good luck.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fri: Hey, what's up farmer guy?^Hey, it's farm girl. Did you get new pants? You're doing something right.#$e#Oh, I almost forgot! It's my day for doing push-ups!#$e#Every time I do push-ups I try to do one more than last time. Pretty cool strategy, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fri4: Hey, @. I'm glad you stopped by.#$e#I'm not ashamed to say that I love my grandma!#$e#Now Grandpa, on the other hand...#$e#Just kidding.$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.fri8: Hi @. You look sporty today.$h^Hey @. Did you do something different with your hair? Something keeps grabbing my attention.$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.gift_taste.dislike: Hmm... I'm not sure I like this...
stardewcraft.npc.alex.gift_taste.hated: Are you serious? This is garbage.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.gift_taste.loved: Hey, awesome! I love this stuff! Thanks, @!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.greenrain: What's going on out there? Any action?#$e#I gotta stay here with my grandparents...$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.greenrain_2: I tried to go for a run this morning, but the plants have gone crazy! I couldn't get very far...
stardewcraft.npc.alex.introduction: Oh, hey. So you're the new guy, huh? Cool.^Hey, you're the new girl, huh? I think we're going to get along great. I'm Alex.#$e#I'll see you around.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.married_haley: You got Haley to marry you, huh? I always figured she was out of your league!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.mon: Did you know I was an all-star quarterback in high school? It's true.$u#$e#See this little star on my jacket here? That proves it.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.mon8: You know, I used to want fame and fortune, but lately I've been starting to sing a different tune. In the end it's the humble little things that satisfy, don't you think?#$e#I still want to go pro, but it's not the most important thing in the world.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.purchasedanimal_ch: Hey, I overheard someone saying that you got your first chicken the other day.#$b#Man... I wish Grandma had chickens. I'd eat a dozen raw eggs for breakfast each morning!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort: Ah... The island life. I could get used to this!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_bar: I'm ordering a banana shake with two scoops of protein powder.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_chair: Aren't you hot in that outfit? C'mon, man... It's the beach!^Aren't you hot in that outfit? You gotta get some ocean breeze goin'!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_leaving: Aw... I guess it can't last forever.$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_shore: I wonder how far I could swim out, and still make it back?#$e#I'm guessing at least a mile.#$b#... Don't worry, I'm not going to try it.$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_towel: With this island open, there's no excuse to be pasty anymore!
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_towel_2: Phew, it feels good to finally get these abs a little sunlight.#$e#Kind of a shame to have them hidden away all the time back home.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_towel_3: When I go pro, I'll vacation on islands all around the world.#$e#But for now, this place will do just fine!$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_wander: I knew I shoulda brought a frisbee... Oh well.$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.resort_wander_2: I wonder if anyone would be up for a volleyball tournament.#$e#Don't worry, I'll go easy!$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.sat: My arms are really sore, but that's the sign of progress for a guy like me.#$e#I must've done a thousand push-ups yesterday.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.sat10: I've been having a hard time staying focused lately.$l
stardewcraft.npc.alex.secondchance_guys: I don't know if I can trust you anymore, but I'm willing to give you a chance.$9
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_1: Hey. Summer is definitely the best time of year.#$e#Right now is great because we've got the whole season to look forward to. Catch you later.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_fri: What do you want?#$e#I've got more important things to do right now.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_fri6: Sorry my room is so messy.$s#$e#It's just hard to always remember to clean. I'm trying to get better, though.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_mon: Hey, farmer guy. You look a little burnt.^Hey Farmer girl. You've got a nice tan going.$h#$e#The more I practice this summer, the easier it'll be for me to go pro.#$e#Then you'd be able to say you knew me once. Cool, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_sat: Mmmm... I smell a barbeque.#$e#Damn I could go for a burger.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_sat10: I've been trying to do more reading lately... I feel like I've been neglecting my brain for years because of my athletic obsession.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_sun: I got these new shoes yesterday 'cuz my old pair had a brown smudge.#$b#I just threw them into the garbage. I would've donated them but I don't like the idea of some weirdo wearing my shoes, ya know?#$e#...What?$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_sun4: Oh wow...your shoes are a little dirty... but that's fine, too!#$e#Different people have different tastes I guess.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_thu: Hey, you must be getting pretty strong working on that farm all day.^Hey, you must be getting pretty fit working on that farm all day.#$e#Maybe you'll reach my level some day. Something to look forward to, huh?#$e#Why do you have that look on your face?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_thu4: Hey, you look like you're getting into some good shape this summer!#$b#All that farm work is paying off, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_tue: If my hair wasn't so popular with the ladies, I swear I'd shave it all off in a second.#$e#*sigh*... Life can be tough.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_wed: Hey farm guy, I've got a question for you.^Hey Farm girl, I've got a question for you.#$b#$q 52/53 summer_Wed_01_old#Do you think I'll ever turn pro?#$r 52 30 summer_Wed_01_01#You're destined to be a sports legend#$r 52 0 summer_Wed_01_02#Maybe, if you practice a lot#$r 53 -50 summer_Wed_01_03#No, you'll most likely fail and become a salesman
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_wed8: You know, I actually wouldn't mind being a farmer... it seems a lot like playing sports, in a way.#$e#I like being outdoors and doing things with my hands.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_wed_01_01: Hey, now that's what I'm talking about!$h#$e#You're cooler than I thought.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_wed_01_02: Yeah, well I'm so good I'm not going to have to practice all that much.$u
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_wed_01_03: That's insane. You're just jealous that I'm talented and popular and you're not.$a^That's ridiculous. You're just jealous that I'm way more popular than you'll ever be, freak.$a#$e#Get away from me.$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.summer_wed_01_old: $p 52#Hey, when I turn pro you can say you were my first "fan". Not bad, huh?|Hey, I've been practicing twice as hard so I can turn pro and prove you wrong. You just wait.$a
stardewcraft.npc.alex.sun: Hey.#$e#What, you wanna talk to me? I'm busy.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.sun2: Hey, @.#$e#That's right, I remember your name.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.thu: The air's starting to warm up... I'm feeling pumped.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.tue: The beach is a cool place to hang out and soak up some rays.#$e#You gotta spend some time in the sun or else you'll get all pale.#$e#*sigh*... I wish there were more girls in this town, know what I mean?$s^Hey, do you wanna hang out with me at the beach some time? Do you have a bikini?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.tue6: Nothing's better than an energetic day at the beach with your friends... right?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.wed: Looks like a good day to play catch, huh?$u#$e#$q 5/6 Wed_01_old#I'd ask you to throw the ball around, but you don't really seem like the sports type.^If you weren't a girl I'd ask you to play catch.#$r 6 0 Wed_01_02#I'm fine just watching you from a distance.#$r 5 15 Wed_01_01#I want to play catch with you!#$r 5 0 Wed_01_03#(angry) What's that supposed to mean?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.wed_01_01: Really? I guess I underestimated you.#$b#My arm's a little sore, but maybe next time.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.wed_01_02: Yeah, some people just aren't made for sports.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.wed_01_old: #$p 5#Go long! ...just kidding. Hahaha.|I just wish I had someone to play catch with...$s
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_1: Winter is kind of lame. There's too much snow to do anything fun.#$e#I guess some people like it.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_fri: You came all the way through the snow to see me?#$e#I guess that makes sense.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_fri4: You came all the way through the snow to see me?#$e#That's nice of you.$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_mon: You like the snow? Me... I'm just looking forward to spring.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_sat: There's some weird people living in this town.#$e#...like that guy Sebastian. Why does he wear black all the time?#$e#I don't get it.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_sat6: I guess it's interesting that some people are totally different than us, you know?#$b#I don't always understand why others act the way they do, but that's fine.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_sun: Hey, the gridball game is on today!#$e#This might be my favorite day of the week.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_thu: When I turn pro, I'll be so rich that I'll get a vacation home in the tropics.#$e#Then I won't have to deal with these boring winters.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_thu10: If I ever make a lot of money, I'll make sure all my friends and family are taken care of.#$e#That means you, too.$h
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_thu6: I wish I could control the weather.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_tue: Hey, can you go find Haley and tell her I said 'hi'?
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_tue4: Hey, @. Could you do me a favor?$l#$b#If you see Haley, tell her I'm busy.$l#$e#Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_tue4_inlaw_: I'll admit... I was a little jealous when you and Haley got married. But, hey... It's a chance for me to learn something new about myself.$9
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_tue_inlaw_h: Oh, hey. How's the married life coming along?$9
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_wed: People stay indoors a lot during the winter, and do boring stuff.$s#$e#Maybe if I read a book I'd be less bored... nah.
stardewcraft.npc.alex.winter_wed8: You know what? I'm going to start reading a book!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.acceptbirthday: Oh... is that... a birthday gift? I see... well, thanks for stopping by.$a
Thanks, sweetie. That's very kind of you to remember my birthday.$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.acceptgift_(o): Oh, you've been foraging! Thank you!$bI'll make a spicy cocktail sauce with this. That'll put some hair on Pierre's chest.$h
Ooohh... this is nice. I'll save it for a quiet day in the sunroom.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.achievement_15: Judging by the savory smells wafting from your place, I can tell you've been busy in the kitchen!$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.cropmatured_81: I noticed you're growing tea on your farm. Make sure to bring me a cup!$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.dating_abigail: Abby told me that you and her are seeing each other. That's sweet!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.eventseen_7199: Are you feeling relaxed? I bet...
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.fall_mon: Fall is Abby's favorite season, so I'm hoping she'll come out of her room more often.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.fall_mon_inlaw: Abby was taking online classes here, but I don't think her heart was really in it...$bShe's a free spirit, like I was before I met Pierre. She's probably having the time of her life on your farm.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.fall_sat: Is it just me, or does Abigail play too many video games?$bMaybe I'm a little old-fashioned.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.fall_tue: I've seen edible mushrooms in the forest.$bForaging can be a fun way to earn some cash. Or you can use what you find as gifts or food.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.fall_wed6: You know, I used to want to be a farmer myself. Well, more like a rancher.$bI always loved movies about the wild west when I was a girl.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.fri: It's a fine-looking day.$bOn days like this I like to help Evelyn with the public gardens.$bShe's strong for her age, but I think she appreciates all the help she can get.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.gift_taste.dis: Oh... this isn't really what I was hoping for.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.gift_taste.hat: This is awful! Why would you give me this?
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.gift_taste.lov: Oh, this is wonderful! Thank you so much!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.greenrain: I've never seen green rain before... It must not be too dangerous if you made it here!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.greenrain_2: Ah, the special rain is back! This year, I'm going to make the most of it!$bThis calls for a cup of green tea!$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.houseupgrade_1: $y 'I heard you got a new kitchen! Think you'll be doing a lot of cooking?_I plan to!_It's a good skill to have. And with all those fresh ingredients on your farm, you'll be sitting pretty!_Nah, it's just for looks_I see. Well, don't forget to eat right... nutrition is important.'
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.introduction: Hello! You must be @, the new farmer. I'm Caroline.$bMy husband runs the general store here. And have you met my daughter, Abigail? She's the pale one with the purple hair.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.married_abigai: I'm so happy for you two! Welcome to the family!$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.married_memory: Ah, the newlywed. So, how was the honeymoon?$bI see. Well, I guess the farm would wither if you took time away...
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.mon: I wish Abby wouldn't spend so much time in her room.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.mon8: #$1 Caroline23#When we first moved to Pelican Town I would take secret walks to the Wizard's tower. Don't tell Pierre, he has jealousy issues.$bAbigail was born about a year after we moved to Pelican Town. I wonder if she'll ever experience life outside the valley?
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.mon_inlaw_abig: Hi, @. Are you enjoying the married life? I hope so!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.movietheater_m: It's fun to have a movie theater in town. I want to go see a western!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.resort: Hi @. Are you here to relax, or to do work?
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.resort_bar: I told Gus to surprise me, and he made an iced green tea with mango zest. How nice!$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.resort_enterin: Willy gave us each a piece of his fish jerky. I'm still chewing on it.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.resort_shore: The water is so warm here compared to the valley. It's really pleasant!
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.sat: Is it just me, or does Abigail have an unhealthy interest in doom and gloom?$bMaybe I'm just too old to understand.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.sat2: Abby's always had a strange interest in the occult. I'm not sure where she gets it from...
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.sat4: Abby's always had a strange interest in the occult. I'm sure it's just a phase...
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.sat6: #$1 Caroline12#When we first moved here, I took a while to settle down... I wasn't ready for the domestic life.$bPierre's a bit conventional... but he's a good man. He's ambitious, but he always puts his family first.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.sat_inlaw_abig: Dinner's been a lot quieter since Abigail moved out...$bNo, not because she used to chew with her mouth open!$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_mon: On Wednesdays the shop is closed.$bKeep that in mind if you're going to need anything.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_sat: Is it just me, or does Abigail look a little pale?$bMaybe I'm just worrying about her too much.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_sat_inl: How's Abigail's health? She's always been such a pale girl. Hopefully the farm lifestyle puts a little color in her cheeks.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_sun: Today I'm just going to relax and think positively.$bDo you ever take a day off?
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_tue: I've been seeing wild fruits in the forest lately.$bForaging can be a fun way to earn some cash. Or you can use what you find as gifts or food.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_wed: Hi there. Do you have everything you need for the farm?$bIf not, we might be able to help you out.$bWe carry a variety of useful items.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.summer_wed6: Time seems to go by faster and faster the older you get...$s
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.sun: Today I'm just going to relax and think positively.$bDo you ever take a day off?
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.thu: #$1 Caroline1#Hmmm... I wonder if I can get Pierre to cook dinner tonight.$bHmmm... what am I going to make for dinner tonight?$bMaybe I'll just get take-out from the Saloon.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.tue: I've seen wild horseradish in the forest.$bForaging can be a fun way to earn some cash. Or you can use what you find as gifts or food.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.wed: Hi there. Do you have everything you need for the farm?$bIf not, we might be able to help you out.$bWe carry a variety of useful items.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.wed6: Stardew Valley is nice, but I wish I knew more people.$bI'm glad that we've become friends.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.winter_fri: Even though it's cold, I still check on the public garden beds every now and then.$bI just want to make sure they aren't damaged too much before spring returns.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.winter_sat: Don't you think Abby would look better with her natural hair color?$bShe used to have light chestnut-colored hair.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.winter_tue: Winter is harsh, but you can dig up some roots if you're lucky.$bForaging can be a fun way to earn some cash. Or you can use what you find as gifts or food.
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.winter_wed6: Are you excited for the new year?$bI predict that you'll be super-successful on your farm.$h
stardewcraft.npc.caroline.wongrange: Pierre's trying to play it cool, but he's seething about losing to you at the Stardew Valley Fair.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.acceptbirthdaygif: Is this a birthday gift? It's, uh... an interesting choice. Well I appreciate that you remembered me, anyway.
I don't usually get birthday gifts. This actually means a lot, @. Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.acceptgift_(o)ski: Oh, interesting... These books aren't very easy to come by in the valley.$bLooks like there's a lot of good tips in here. Thanks, @.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.acceptgift_(o)sta: You're giving this... to me? I don't think I deserve it, but.. thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.cc_minecart: Somehow, the old town minecart system started working again. It's very convenient for getting to and from the mines.$bDon't get too cozy, though... if it can start up so suddenly, it could just as well shut down...
stardewcraft.npc.clint.dating_emily: I... um... heard that you and Emily are together. Congratulations.$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.divorced_emily: I've been feeling strangely hopeful lately.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.event_advice1: Okay... I'll keep that in mind.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.event_advice2: That's the problem... I do act natural... but I never have any success.$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.eventseen_101_mem: Did Emily say anything about our date the other day?$bWait, don't tell me... I'm better off not knowing. Maybe I can still salvage my dignity.$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.fri: The weather doesn't really matter to me. I typically stay near my shop year-round.$bDepressing, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.clint.fri8: I should save up and buy a computer...$bMaybe I can find a girlfriend on the 'internet'...$s$bWhat? Don't judge me! Not everyone is a cool, attractive, socially-adept farmer, you know!$u$bWhat's a guy like me supposed to do? *Groan*$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.geode_placeholder: I'm not set up for geode processing yet. Check back later!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.gift_taste.liked: This is a fun gift. Thanks!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.gift_taste.loved: Yes! This is exactly what I've been looking for!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.greenrain: It's situations like this where a person's true character is put to the test.$bI'll keep Em... I mean, I'll keep everyone safe from the toxic rain!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.greenrain_2: I feel bad admitting it, but sometimes I wish there was a real disaster, not just some dumb green rain.$bSomething to shake everything up, you know?$bNot that I want people to get hurt...$bI just want to feel alive... To feel like I have a purpose...
stardewcraft.npc.clint.greenrainfinished: Well that was a dud. And here I thought it was finally my chance to be a hero. Oh well... Back to the grindstone.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.introduction: Er... hi. I'm Clint.$bI'm the town blacksmith. If you ever need to upgrade your tools, I'm your guy.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.married_emily: %Clint is looking at the ground and won't say anything to you.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.minearea_121: Interesting. There's tiny iridium flakes on your pickaxe... you've been going to the desert caves, huh?$bI've always wanted to smelt with iridium. It's not easy to come by.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.minearea_40: Ah, I can tell from the scratch marks on your pickaxe that you've reached a deeper layer of the mines.$bIf it starts getting difficult to break stones, you'll want to upgrade your pickaxe. I can help.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.mon: Yep. I'm a blacksmith.$bMy father was also a blacksmith.$bMy grandfather was a blacksmith as well.$u$q 9/9 Mon_old#I bet you can't guess what my great-grandfather was...$r 9 30 Mon_9#A blacksmith.$r 9 50 Mon_clown#A silly clown.$r 9 -50 Mon_rude#A sarcastic jerk.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.mon4: Be glad you're a farmer, @. It's nicer to work outdoors than by a hot furnace all day.$bI'm only a blacksmith because my father pushed me into it.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.mon8: I hate to say it, but sometimes I'm glad my father forced me to become a blacksmith. At least I have a profession.$bIf I didn't have work to do, I'd probably spend all day just sitting around feeling sorry for myself.$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.mon_old: And yes, my great-grandfather was also a blacksmith.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.mon_rude: Wow. That was rude. I was just being funny and you took it to a whole new level.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.no_inventory_spac: Your inventory is full! Make some room and come back.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.no_tools: You'll need to bring me a tool if you want me to upgrade it.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.no_upgrades: Looks like all your tools are already at their best!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.reject_868: Hmm... That's an interesting stone, like nothing I've ever seen before.$bI wouldn't know what to do with it, though. I deal in the mundane, not the magical...
stardewcraft.npc.clint.resort: *sigh*... We're all at the beach but I still feel so alone...$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.resort_chair: Ow... my whole torso is burnt to a crisp.$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.resort_entering: I'm gonna put on my special red trunks. They're supposed to be really eye-catching.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.resort_leaving: Well, that didn't turn out like I was imagining...
stardewcraft.npc.clint.resort_shore: Oh no... I forgot to clip my toenails.$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.resort_shore_2: I thought working a furnace would have prepared me for this heat, but I'm sweating in places I didn't know I could.$s$bI hope no one noticed...$b%Clint's body is glistening...
stardewcraft.npc.clint.sat: Sometimes I wonder how I ended up in this town.$u
stardewcraft.npc.clint.sat10: How are your tools holding up?$bIf they ever need repairs, just come by my shop. I guarantee these tools for life!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.sat6: Damn it, I'm too old to do anything exciting anymore. All I have to look forward to is years and years of sweaty, hot furnace-work.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.shop_dialogue: I've got metal and ores if you need 'em.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.still_working: I'm still working on your tool. It'll take another couple of days.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.still_working_tom: I'm still working on your tool. It'll be ready tomorrow.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.sun: Don't you have work to do?
stardewcraft.npc.clint.sun4: So how are your tools holding up?
stardewcraft.npc.clint.sun8: I don't know if people realize this, or care, but I do take a lot of pride in my work.$bI mean... When I was a boy I didn't really dream of becoming a blacksmith. But that's what I am. And I want to be the best blacksmith I can be.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.thu: Business has been slow lately.$bYou should upgrade your tools. I could use the cash.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.thu8: I heard Emily has a friend who lives in the desert. Do you know anything about her?$bI wonder if she's single...$s
stardewcraft.npc.clint.tool_pickup: Here's your upgraded tool. It should serve you well!
stardewcraft.npc.clint.tue: If you want me to upgrade your tools you'll have to give me the correct ore.$bAnd you'll have to pay me a fee, of course.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.upgrade_dialogue: I can upgrade your tools with the right materials.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.upgrade_started: I'll get started on that right away. Come back in a couple days.
stardewcraft.npc.clint.wed6: Oh, hi @. Sorry If I look a little messy. I've been working at the furnace all morning.$h$bSo, did you need anything, or do you just want to visit?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.acceptbirthda: Oh... for my birthday? Well, it's the thought that counts.
Wow, this is a great birthday gift! Thank you so much, @.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.acceptgift_(o: A dinosaur egg! Do you realize how rare and scientifically valuable this is!?
Hmm, this tea has some very interesting properties. Thank you, @.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.dating_maru: So... I understand you and Maru have become... close.#$e#I trust you and I want you to know that I'm watching... er, I mean I'm happy for both of you.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fall_fri: Maru sure spends a lot of time working on those gadgets of hers.#$e#I'm glad she's so dedicated.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fall_mon: During this time of year I divert my attentions to fungi.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fall_sat: Let's see... perhaps the nitrogen fixation level is affected by nematode secretions...#$b#Oh! Sorry. I was pondering some data and I didn't notice you there.#$e#Do you need anything?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fall_thu: How's the farming business going? It's corn season, isn't it?#$e#I can imagine it being pretty peaceful, working outdoors with plants all day.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fall_tue: We know a lot about nature thanks to science.#$e#But there's always a lot more to learn.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fri: Robin has a hot temper. It's better to stay on her good side.#$e#Don't tell her I said that.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.fri4: I know I sometimes seem absent-minded, but I do appreciate it when people visit me in the lab.#$e#Thanks for dropping by, @.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.gift_taste.di: Hmm... this isn't really my thing.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.gift_taste.ha: What? Why would you give me this?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.gift_taste.lo: Oh wow, this is incredible! You really made my day.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.greenrain: Don't mind me, @. I'm just collecting some samples. This may be a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!#$e#Erm... If you see my wife, can you tell her I'm okay?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.greenrain_2: The rain appears to be harmless, so I'm taking less precaution this year.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.introduction: Greetings! I'm Demetrius, local scientist and father. Thanks for introducing yourself!#$e#I'm studying the local plants and animals from my home laboratory.#$b#Have you met my daughter Maru? She's interested to meet you.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.married_maru: I hope you're taking good care of my daughter.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.married_sebas: I hope married life is treating you well.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.mon: Maru helps me out in the lab sometimes... She's a good kid.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.sat: Let's see... If compounds in the rhizosphere contain sufficient levels of Carbon-13, then...#$b#Oh! Sorry. I was pondering some data and I didn't notice you there.#$e#Do you need anything?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.summer_fri: So I heard Maru had you look through that telescope out back.#$e#Pretty exciting, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.summer_mon: #$e#%Demetrius is deep in thought.#$e#Sorry, I'm really busy.#$e#There's so many plants to study right now.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.summer_sat: Hmm... If strigolactone levels could be increased, would it have a proportional effect on mycorrhizal growth?#$b#Oh! Sorry. I was pondering some data and I didn't notice you there.#$e#Do you need anything?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.summer_thu: How's the farming business going? It's tomato season, isn't it?#$e#I can imagine it being pretty peaceful, working outdoors with plants all day.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.summer_tue: Make sure to water your plants every day.#$e#Although, if you're using water retaining soil you don't need to worry about watering as often.#$e#It's pretty convenient.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.sun: It's good to take a break from work every now and then.#$e#I guess that's kind of difficult when you live on a farm, though.#$e#Hey, at least in the winter you don't have to worry about crops.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.thu: How's the farming business going? It's parsnip season, isn't it?#$e#I can imagine it being pretty peaceful, working outdoors with plants all day.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.tue: This valley has a very vibrant and diverse ecosystem. That's one reason I was excited to move here.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.wed: You're probably growing a lot of interesting plants on your farm, huh?#$e#Maybe I'll stop by your place some day and check it out.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.winter_mon: I'm taking a break from my research right now.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.winter_sat: Let's see... if seasonal nitrogen levels could be modeled by a piecewise function...#$b#Oh! Sorry. I was analyzing data and I didn't notice you there.#$e#Do you need anything?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.winter_sun: Feel free to harvest as much lumber and stone from this area as you please.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.winter_thu: Do you have any animals on your farm?
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.winter_tue: Talk to my wife if you want to increase the size of your house.
stardewcraft.npc.demetrius.winter_wed: Do you have a kitchen in your house yet?#$e#Cooking is kind of like doing lab work.
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.fri: You've never seen a dwarf before, have you?
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.gift_taste.dislik: Hmm... Is this what humans like?
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.gift_taste.hated: I don't care what species you are. This is worthless garbage.
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.gift_taste.liked: Ah, this reminds me of home.
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.gift_taste.loved: Hey, I really love this stuff. You can find great things in the mines.
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.mon: I got all this stuff from the surface. I just take it from your people during the night.#$e#Hmm? What is this concept you call "private property"?
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.sat: It's dangerous in the mines. Why don't you buy a few things from my shop to ensure your safety?
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.sun: One day you'll have to tell me about this beverage you call "milk".
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.thu: You're not a spy sent by the Shadow People, are you?#$e#I'm keeping my eye on you.
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.tue: Ah... cave carrot stew, cave carrot roast, cave carrot soup and cave carrots au gratin.#$e#...And a ramekin of cave carrot brulee to sweeten the night.#$e#What?
stardewcraft.npc.dwarf.wed: Hey, you're pretty good at mining, for a human.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.acceptbirthdayg: Oh... for my birthday? Well, thank you for remembering.
A birthday gift? How thoughtful! Thank you, @.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.acceptgift_(o)4: A duck feather! Such a beautiful specimen. Thank you, @!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.acceptgift_(o)s: What remarkable tea... I feel a warmth spreading through me. Thank you, @.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.acceptgift_posi: A book! What a delightful gift. There's nothing quite like the smell of fresh pages.
You found this on the beach? How lovely. I appreciate you thinking of me.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.breakup: I see... Well, perhaps it's for the best. Goodbye.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.dating_elliott: I've never felt so inspired. I think love might be the ultimate muse.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.divorced: I'll always fondly remember our time together... but it's clearly over now.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.dumped_guys: I... I don't understand. I thought we had something special.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_fri: My legs are stiff from sitting at my writing desk all morning.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_fri4: I've been making good progress on my novel today. Inspiration strikes when you least expect it!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_mon: Hello @.#$e#Make sure and take breaks from your work now and then.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_mon4: The falling leaves remind me of the passage of time. Beautiful, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_sat: It gets windy this time of year. Marvelous!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_sun: I have to remember to water my plants today. And not with sea water this time!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_thu: Oh dear! A tiny crab appears to have made his home in my shirt pocket.#$e#That's the trouble with living on the beach.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fall_tue: It's been said that a pirate's ship, full of plundered gold, shipwrecked here a long time ago.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.firstvisit_elli: Ah... please excuse the mess in my cabin. I wasn't expecting anyone to walk in!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.flowerdance_acc: It would be my honor to accompany you.
My dear, I wouldn't dream of dancing with anyone else.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.flowerdance_dec: I appreciate the offer, but I have other plans. Perhaps next year?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fri: The fresh air of this valley is good for body and mind.#$e#A quick stroll outdoors always invigorates me.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fri4: I wonder what it would be like to sail across the open ocean. Terrifying, perhaps... but also romantic.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.fri8: I couldn't imagine living anywhere else now. This valley is my home.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.gift_taste.disl: Hmm... I appreciate the thought, but this isn't quite my taste.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.gift_taste.hate: I... really don't care for this. Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.gift_taste.like: How kind of you. Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.gift_taste.love: This is... exquisite! My deepest thanks, @.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.greenrain: Let's not get in a tizzy, now... Gus! I propose a round of drinks to settle the nerves!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.greenrain_2: Ah, yet another unique day in the valley. Stimulating, to say the least!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.introduction: Ah, the new farmer we've all been expecting... and whose arrival has sparked many a conversation!#$b#I'm Elliott... I live in the little cabin by the beach. It's a pleasure to meet you.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.married_elliott: My dear, you are the greatest thing that ever happened to me.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.mon: I'm kind of new to this town myself, but I really feel at home.#$e#I moved here only a year before you.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.mon4: The sea has been especially beautiful lately. Have you taken a walk to the shore?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.sat: You probably wouldn't like it inside my cabin. It's dark and full of spiders.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.sat4: I've been reading a lot of classical literature lately. There's a depth to those old tales that modern writing sometimes lacks.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.sat6: The sunset last night was remarkable. A painter could hardly do it justice.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.secondchance_gu: Perhaps we can try again? I'd like that.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_fri: @? You look puzzled.#$b#I guess the hot summer air can make us a little dizzy.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_mon: A gentle little sunbeam woke me up this morning. I've never felt so refreshed.#$e#I'm sorry if that isn't very interesting to you.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_mon4: The warmth of summer makes me sleepy in the afternoon. I usually take a short nap.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_mon6: I've been watching the waves more often lately. There's something meditative about the rhythm.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_sat: The sun is angry today... My skin is a bit too delicate, I'm afraid.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_sun: You came all the way here just to talk to me? How kind.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_sun4: The summer breeze carries the scent of wildflowers. Intoxicating!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_thu: Oh dear! My shoes are filled with sand.#$e#That's the trouble with living on the beach.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_tue: I've encountered some beautiful shells in front of my house.#$e#I would imagine the rarer varieties to be quite valuable.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_tue6: The sound of the sea is like a lullaby. It makes writing poetry so much easier.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.summer_wed: It must be satisfying to follow your crop from seed to harvest.#$e#It's as if your essence is infused into the fruit.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.sun: Hello. I hope your new farming life is panning out as you'd hoped?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.sun6: I feel like the valley itself is alive... whispering ancient secrets when the wind blows.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.thu2: Did you know this valley was once home to ancient peoples?#$e#I find the history of this place rather fascinating.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.thu4: The birdsongs here inspire me. Each melody is like a tiny poem.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.thu6: I've finally settled on a title for my novel.#$e#But I'll keep it a secret for now.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.thu8: Your visits always brighten my day, @.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.tue: A great idea can pass through your head when you least expect it... but if your mind is too busy you might miss it.#$e#Well, I really must get back to my work.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.tue6: I've been thinking about writing a romance novel... inspired by certain recent events.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.wed: The forest is a wonderful place. Have you been there?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.wed8: Sometimes I imagine myself as the hero of my own novel. I suppose we all do that, to some extent.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_fri: I have to brush my hair daily, or else it'll clump up into messy knots.#$e#It's a lot of work.#$e#I'm surprised I haven't just shaved it off in a fit of passion.#$e#I suppose I am too vain.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_mon: You've come to visit me in the cold?#$e#I could do with a respite from my lonely labors.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_mon4: The winter storms are dramatic. Sometimes the waves crash right up to my door!
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_sat: I've been doing little indoor exercises, since it's often too cold to go out.#$e#Sorry if it's a little humid in the cabin.
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_sun: I really should scrub my floorboards today. I think an algae is starting to form.#$e#Do you make time for cleaning?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_thu: Breathe deeply. Do you notice it? That's the smell of the sea.#$e#How does it make you feel?
stardewcraft.npc.elliott.winter_tue: People have scraped a living off the sea for thousands of years.#$e#I just go to the grocery store.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptbirthdaygif: Oh, you remembered my birthday! Thanks, @! That's really ni--$h#$b#...*sniff*...*sniff*... what is that smell?$s#$b#... What is this...?$s
Oh, you remembered my birthday! Thanks, @! That's really nice of you.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)60: $c 0.5#Oh!... Heheh... I know exactly why you gave me this stone today. Very interesting...#Wow, it's beautiful! This color makes me think of all the spiritual power within the forest... Can you feel that wood energy?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)62: $c 0.5#It's so smooth! When I hold it... I can feel the energy of all the mermaids in the sea. Thank you!#Thank you! I'm gonna put this under my pillow, and hopefully I'll dream about the ocean.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)64: $c 0.5#Wow, look at that color! It matches perfectly with my outfit.$h#Oh, this is perfect... I've been feeling a little sluggish lately. Rubies are great for energizing the spirit!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)66: $c 0.5#Oh, it's beautiful, @! I hope you didn't put yourself in too much danger to get this.$h#Ah, an amethyst! This will protect me on those late nights working at the Saloon.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)68: $c 0.5#Oh, wow... Thank you! This color perfectly captures my mood today.$h#The warm, soothing energy of this stone helps us re-center our thoughts... It's actually just what I needed on a day like this. Thanks!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)70: $c 0.5#That's funny, I had a dream that you would give me a piece of jade today!$h#Ooh, it's jade! This is supposed to attract wealth... And who couldn't do with a few extra coins in the pocket?$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(o)sta: Wow, thank you! I've heard that if you drink this before bed you'll have vivid dreams.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.acceptgift_(tr)pa: Oh, good, it's still warm... Poor thing, where's it's mother? *Whisper* ...I'll be your mother, don't worry... Poor baby.$s#$b#I'm glad you gave this to me, @. I'll take very good care of it.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.breakup: B...But I thought we had a special bond... *sniff*$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.dating_emily: %Emily has a big smile on her face.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.dating_emily_memo: We're going to have a lot of fun together, I just know it.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.divorced: @... You broke my heart... I just can't talk to you anymore.$s#$e#Please, let me try to heal...$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.divorced_haley: Haley is too proud to be heartbroken over the divorce... Or at least to show it.$3
stardewcraft.npc.emily.event_dance2: Um... Okay. Sorry you didn't like it. I guess those three years of practice were a complete waste...$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.event_dance3: Did you really think so? That's exactly the effect I was shooting for!$h#$b#I'm so glad you liked it.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_1: Well, fall is here. Time to plant some new crops, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_fri: Another beautiful fall day.#$e#It's a pity it'll soon be over.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_fri6: Smell that clean air? It's lovely, isn't it?#$b#I just fear that the Joja Co.'s of the world will take this away from us.$u
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_mon: It's good weather for a picnic, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_mon8: If I didn't have to work I'd suggest we go on a nice picnic!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_sat: Keep your mind open and some interesting things might take root.#$e#Anyway, how is your day going?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_sat6: I don't have any huge plans for life. I prefer not to stress about the future.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_sun: Nothing like a sunny Sunday to lift the spirits!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_sun10: You're such a nice person, @! Thanks for being my friend.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_sun6: There's so many invisible barriers holding us back. Why can't people learn to let go and explore their true potential?#$e#Me? Well, you know what they say... 'You can't cage a wild Junimo'.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_thu: Are you friends with Clint? He's a nice guy, if you get to know him.#$e#He gets lonely working in his shop all day. But he's so shy he has trouble making new friends.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_thu8: I think Clint's mad at me. He never looks at me anymore...$u#$e#I always thought we were friends.$u
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_tue: Hello. Did you have a good summer?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_tue4: Hi @! I bet your farm did great this past summer, huh?#$e#You're an excellent farmer.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fall_wed: My friend runs a shop in the desert. If you ever go there stop in and say hi for me.#$e#I think she sells some rare products.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.flowerdance_accep: Yes, I'd love to dance with you, @!$h#$e#Now I'm excited... This is going to be a lot of fun!
Of course, my love. I've been looking forward to this!$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.flowerdance_decli: I'm very sorry... but I've already agreed to dance with someone else.$u
stardewcraft.npc.emily.fri: Ah, spring. The season of pastels. I actually prefer jewel tones, myself.#$b#Oh, excuse me! I was mumbling about fashion again, wasn't I?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.gift_taste.dislik: Oh... that's not really my thing. But thanks anyway.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.gift_taste.hated: Eww... no offense, but I really don't want that.$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.gift_taste.liked: Hey, that's really nice of you! Thanks.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.gift_taste.loved: Oh my gosh! I love this! Thank you, @!$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.greenrain: There must be a meaning behind this... Nature is trying to tell us something.$3#$e#What, though? I can't tell... It's hard to read. I feel a strong presence, though...$3
stardewcraft.npc.emily.greenrain_2: Can you feel it? The forest is singing! The trees are dancing with joy!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.introduction: Ooh!... I can read it on your face. You're going to love it here in Pelican Town.#$b#If you're ever looking for something to do in the evening, stop by the saloon. That's where I work!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.married_haley: That was a beautiful wedding... I'm really happy for you and Haley!$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.married_shane: Well, now that you're married, I assume Shane won't be coming to the Saloon as much!#$e#That's probably a good thing, but it's always a little sad to lose a regular...$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.mon: Have I told you Haley and I are sisters? Strange, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.mon2: I have a secret hobby, but I won't say any more.#$e#Maybe I'll show you some day.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.mon4: This world is full of spirits and magic... Some don't believe me, but I know it's true.#$e#I can see it in your eyes... you believe in the other world, like me.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.mon6: I wish Haley would get a job or at least contribute to cooking and cleaning.$s#$e#I think she's hoping to marry someone rich.$u
stardewcraft.npc.emily.mon6_inlaw_haley: I have to say, now that Haley's gone I've had a much easier time keeping things in order.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.mon8: There's good people in this town who just can't seem to find happiness. It makes me sad.$u#$e#Working in the saloon, I hear first-hand about everyone's problems.$u
stardewcraft.npc.emily.sat: I like making my own clothes, but it's not easy to get cloth.#$e#And it's such a long trip to the city.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.sat6: Do you ever think about the texture of fabric, @? Each texture has a distinct personality... feel my dress... see?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.secondchance_girl: @... I'm ready to give you a second chance. I still have faith that there's a good person inside of you.$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_fri: If I wasn't so busy I'd come help you on the farm!#$e#But Gus would be upset if I had another job...$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_fri6: You know, I'm sure Gus would understand if I wanted to leave the Saloon someday.#$b#There's so much out there, I can't stay a barmaid forever.$u
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_mon: Haley is a picky eater. It's so hard to cook for her.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_mon4: Eating healthy is very important to me. I want to live a long and active life.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_mon_inlaw_: Haley and I get along much better now that she's moved out. I look forward to her visits!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_sat: Don't overwork yourself or you might end up in Harvey's clinic!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_sun4: It's around this time of year that my good friends visit the region... I mean the parrots!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_sun6: Hi, @! We've become decent friends, haven't we?$h#$e#That's fine with me. You're a cool guy.^I'm glad.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_sun8: Hi, @! We've become decent friends, haven't we?$h#$e#This may sound weird, but I've always been certain this would happen.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_thu: I consider the bees and butterflies to be my special friends!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_tue6: I feel bad for Linus. People judge him, but he's just living a different lifestyle.$u#$e#I wish everyone could learn to be accepting of others.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.summer_wed: It doesn't rain much in summer, does it?#$e#That just means more watering work for you, huh?#$e#Or do you enjoy the sunny weather?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.sun: Hi @!#$e#Do you raise sheep in your barn? You can turn their wool into beautiful bolts of cloth!#$e#You'll need a loom, though. You can make them yourself if you know the crafting recipe.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.sun4: This house was left in our care by my parents. They've been traveling the world for the last two years.#$e#We have no idea when they'll be back.#$e#I enjoy living here, though. It's a beautiful area and the town is nice.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.thu: I hope you're farming in a sustainable way. The valley's ecosystem is fragile!#$e#How do I know? I have a strong gut-feeling!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.thu4: Sometimes the flowers speak to me... each one has a different story to tell!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.tue: I work part-time at Gus' saloon. It pays the bills.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.tue4: I'm just working at Gus' to make ends meet... but my real passion is tailoring.$u#$e#I made these clothes from scratch, see?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.tue6: Oh, hi... It's nice of you to visit me like this.$h
stardewcraft.npc.emily.tue8: You know, @... I think the future looks bright for both of us.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.wed: I've heard rumors of rare and powerful magic rings, forged long ago by forgotten civilizations. I'm not sure if it's true or just a fairy tale.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.wed4: You catch fish? I just hope you treat the poor things humanely.$s#$e#Every critter deserves our respect, even the slimy ones.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.wed6: Have faith... every day you're taking one more step on the path of your destiny.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.wed8: $query PLAYER_NPC_RELATIONSHIP current any married roommate#Hey, @.#$e#I always knew we would become good friends. It was written in the stars!|Hi, @.$u#$e#I always knew we'd become close like this...
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_fri: If I wasn't so busy I'd help you dig around in that cave by the lake.#$e#I bet there are some powerful crystals inside there.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_mon: Be careful an icicle doesn't fall on your head!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_mon10: Be careful an icicle doesn't fall on your head! I wouldn't want you to get hurt!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_sat: Do you know how to cook 'Bean Hotpot'?#$e#I like that dish quite a bit.$h%revealtaste:Emily:207#$e#It's hard to get fresh ingredients in the winter, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_sun6: My sister and I might fight sometimes, but I would really miss her if she left.#$e#I think she'll become a very nice young lady some day... Don't tell her I said that.$h#$e#So, is there anything you want to talk about?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_sun6_inlaw: Say hi to my sister for me! And remind her to visit me tomorrow.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_thu: It must be so cold for the poor fish.$s#$e#I wonder if any fish hibernate? Maybe I should ask Demetrius.
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_tue: Oh, hello @!$h#$e#You must be getting very good at farming by now, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_tue2: I bet you're an excellent farmer by now!
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_tue4: I think my hair is frozen solid...$s
stardewcraft.npc.emily.winter_wed: Haley and I aren't made for such a big house. It's a hassle to keep it clean.#$e#Ah well. I really shouldn't be complaining.#$e#Your farmhouse seems nice and cozy.$h
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.acceptgift_(o)17: Oh! This is lovely, dear. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.acceptgift_(o)st: Oh my, this tea is simply wonderful! Thank you, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.acceptgift_posit: You found this on the beach? How thoughtful of you, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.cc_complete: The community center looks wonderful! It reminds me of the old days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.divorce: Oh dear... I'm sorry to hear about your troubles.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_mon: With every year I appreciate the seasons more and more. For young people it's easy to let them slip by.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_sat: Are you friends with Alex?#$e#Sometime he worries me sick.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_sun: My eyesight may be poor, but my nose hasn't failed me yet!#$e#I can smell fallen leaves and mushrooms. It reminds me of the forests I used to play in as a girl.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_thu: Today I'm baking cookies. They're shaped like little pumpkins.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_tue: I've been putting raisins in George's oatmeal... but he hasn't said a word. I wonder if he even notices these things?
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_wed: The good Mayor put me in charge of the town's public gardens.#$e#The fall flowers are delicate, so don't go stomping on them! I know how you kids like to do.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fri: George spends the whole day in front of that darned television set.#$e#I wish he'd go outside more. Some fresh air would do him good.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.disli: Oh... I don't really like this, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.hated: Oh my... I really don't want this, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.liked: How sweet of you, dear. Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.loved: Oh my! This is wonderful, dear. Thank you so much!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.greenrain: George, dear... Is this the end? It's been a good life, but I'd like to see Alex find his way before departing...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.greenrain_2: The flowers seem to love this rain...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.greenrainfinishe: Oh thank goodness... I was so worried!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.introduction: Why, hello and welcome to our little community, dear!#$b#You can call me 'Granny' if you like.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.married: I hear you've gotten married! How wonderful, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.mon: Oh my! What a lovely day.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.sat: I used to love looking at the clouds, but I have trouble seeing them these days.#$e#My eyes just don't work as well as they used to.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_mon: I feel more energetic in this wonderful weather.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_sat: Be careful out there, dear. You could get sunburnt!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_sun: Sweet peas are in bloom right now.#$e#They've got such a wonderful fragrance, haven't they?
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_thu: I'm going to bake cookies today. They're coconut wonders shaped like little palm trees! Heehee.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_tue: George is always a little less grumpy in the summer. The warm weather softens his bones.#$e#You might not be able to tell, but I can. I've known him for sixty years!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_wed: The good Mayor put me in charge of the town's public gardens.#$e#I've been working on the town flower beds for months, so don't step on them!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.sun: It's nice to be so close to the ocean. The sound of the sea makes going to sleep a lot easier.#$e#As kids we hunted for seashells after the tide went out. Those were the days...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.thu: I'll be baking cookies today. I like to make flower shapes in the spring.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.tue: Don't mind my husband, George. He isn't very friendly to strangers.#$e#If you get to know him better he'll warm up to you.#$e#I'm sure you two could become good friends one day!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.tue6: You've been so kind to George and me, dear. It means the world to us.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.wed: I saw the most beautiful family of butterflies sunning themselves in the town garden yesterday.#$e#The good Mayor put me in charge of the town's public gardens.#$e#I've been working on the town flower beds for weeks, so don't step on them!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_mon: Be careful you don't slip on the ice, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_sat: We've lived here for over 30 years.#$e#We've seen a lot of people come and go. Your grandfather, for one. Bless him...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_sun: You should make some hot soup to stay warm.#$e#And make sure you wear a jacket!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_thu: Today I'm baking cookies. They're shaped like little winter stars.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_tue: Aren't you cold? You should wear a thicker jacket, my dear!#$e#This weather isn't good for my joints...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_wed: I usually tend to the gardens, but they're covered in snow.#$e#I still like to check up on them now and then.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.birthday.negati: Oh... you remembered my birthday. Thank you for thinking of me.
A birthday gift? That's what you chose? ...Thanks, I guess.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.birthday.neutra: It's my birthday today. Thank you for the gift.
You remembered my birthday? ...I suppose that counts for something.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.birthday.positi: Oh, a birthday gift? How nice of you! Thank you!
Oh... a birthday gift? Well... I suppose you remembered. Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.gift.already_to: I've already received a gift from you today.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.gift.already_we: You've already given me two gifts this week.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.gift.liked: This is a really nice gift.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.quest_delivery_: Thank you! This is just what I needed.
stardewcraft.npc.george.acceptgift_(o)st: Hmm... *sip*... ahhh... Tastes just like Mama's tuna casserole! Delicious!
stardewcraft.npc.george.divorced_once: Hmmph... took the easy way out, huh?#$e#People these days treat marriage like a television set... If you get bored, just change the channel! Back in my day... *grumble*
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri: So you're a farmer, huh? At least it's honest work.
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri10: You know, I really have been a grumpy old man to everyone. But now I feel like I'm softening up like an old ripe fruit. Hehe!$h#$e#Take care, son.^Take care, hun.
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri4: My grand-pap was a farmer. It's a respectable profession.#$e#If I wasn't so darned old I'd come to your farm and show you a thing or two...
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri8: I've been thinking...Maybe I've been a little bit of a grouch.$s#$e#I used to think no one cared about us old folks.
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.disli: What am I supposed to do with this? Hmmph.
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.hated: What?! This is awful! Get this away from me!
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.liked: Hmmph... okay, this is actually pretty nice. Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.loved: Well, well... this is a very fine gift! Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.george.greenrain: There, there, honey... Don't you worry.%noturn#$b#Even if it is poisonous, I breathed in more noxious gas in one minute back in the ol' coal mines... And I'm still kickin'!
stardewcraft.npc.george.greenrain_2: Looks like the young folks will have to do some extra weeding after this one...Heheh...$h
stardewcraft.npc.george.introduction: Hmmph... It's irritating to have to meet all these new people, huh?#$b#Name's George, by the way. Now buzz off... Hmmph.
stardewcraft.npc.george.married_alex: ...Hmmph.^I'd like to become a great-grandpa before I croak. Think you can make that happen?
stardewcraft.npc.george.mon: I'm not much of a talker. Especially not to strangers, if you don't mind me saying.
stardewcraft.npc.george.mon6: I'm surprised you want to be friends with an old-timer like me.
stardewcraft.npc.george.sat: The weekend is no different than any other time, for me.#$e#That's how it is when you're retired.
stardewcraft.npc.george.sun: Aren't you cold? They don't make sweaters like they used to.#$e#*Sigh*
stardewcraft.npc.george.thu: I can't talk right now, young man.^I can't talk right now, miss.#$e#My favorite program is on.
stardewcraft.npc.george.thu10: When you get as old as me it's a lot harder to adjust to new things.#$e#One day you'll know what I mean.#$e#Go on, enjoy yourself while you're still young.
stardewcraft.npc.george.thu6: Hello, @. Wanna watch the TV with me?
stardewcraft.npc.george.tue: Hmmph... Looks like another gloomy day.$s
stardewcraft.npc.george.tue10: You know, I shouldn't get too depressed about my legs.#$e#I should just be happy that I'm alive.$h
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed: Alex is my grandson. Have I told you that already?#$e#Huh? Speak up.
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed10: @! Let me turn off this darned television and we can have a little chat.$h#$e#So what are the young people doing these days?
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed10_inlaw_alex: I'll admit, I thought it was... strange... for two men to be together. But you're such a nice young man, and I know you two are in love... I've changed my mind.^You're part of the family, now... and I couldn't be more proud.
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed8: I wish my legs worked so I could play catch with Alex.$s#$e#That'll never happen.$s
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed_inlaw_alex: How can two men get married? It's unnatural... Hmmph. I guess I'm just "old fashioned"...^You're part of the family, now. I'm glad that my grandson found such a nice wife.
stardewcraft.npc.george.winter_1: Ohh... It's so cold.#$e#When you're young the cold doesn't bite as hard.
stardewcraft.npc.george.winterstar_giveg: You don't like it, huh? Bah! Kids these days... no appreciation for anything. That was expensive, and I'm not made of money, you know!
stardewcraft.npc.gift.confirm: Are you sure you want to give %1$s to %2$s?
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.default: Welcome! Let me know if you'd like to donate anything to the collection.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.dialogue.nothin: You don't have anything to donate right now. But if you find any artifacts or minerals, bring them to me!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.donation_ended: Thank you for your generous contribution! The museum's collection grows richer every day.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.donation_exit_b: Hold on! You haven't finished your donation yet. Please come talk to me before you leave, so I can properly catalog everything.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.donation_starte: Wonderful! Just place your items on any of the exhibit stands. When you're done, come back and talk to me to finalize the donation.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.fri: I spend most of my time studying the collection. There's always something new to discover.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.gift_taste.hate: I... don't think I have a place for this.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.gift_taste.love: Oh! This is quite the specimen. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.introduction: Welcome to the museum! I'm Gunther, the curator here.#$b#If you find any interesting artifacts or minerals, please consider donating them to the collection!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.menu.question: I see you've brought some artifacts. Would you like to make a donation?
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.menu.question_d: Are you finished arranging your donations?
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.mon: The museum has been rather quiet lately. More donations would really liven things up!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.prismatic_hint: Thank you for your generous contribution!#$b#Hmm... that Prismatic Shard you donated is truly extraordinary. I've only read about these in ancient texts.#$b#You know, the Wizard seems to have a particular interest in prismatic energy. If you ever find another one, perhaps you should show it to him.$h
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.reward_granted: Thank you for your generous contribution!#$b#As a token of appreciation for your dedication to the museum, I have some rewards for you. Please check your inventory!$h
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.sat: Saturdays are usually our busiest day. Well... relatively speaking.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.sun: Even on Sundays, the museum is open. Knowledge never rests!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.thu: Did you know this valley was once home to an ancient civilization? The artifacts don't lie.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.tue: Every artifact tells a story about the valley's rich history.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.wed: I've been cataloguing some fascinating mineral specimens. The geology of this region is truly remarkable.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.acceptgift_(o)stard: Oh wow, thank you! I'm tempted to drink all of it, but I'm going to save some for the saloon. I bet I could make an interesting cocktail with this!
stardewcraft.npc.gus.acceptgift_positive: *sniff*... Ah. Exquisite cuisine. You know what I like, @.$h
stardewcraft.npc.gus.dating_emily_memory: Emily has a real pep in her step lately... I wonder why? *wink*
stardewcraft.npc.gus.divorced_once: Hey, I'm sorry to hear about the break-up...$s#$e#If you need company, you're always welcome at the Saloon.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.divorced_twice: Another failed marriage? Well, it happens. Guess I'll be seeing you at the Saloon more often...$s
stardewcraft.npc.gus.fri: Hi there, @. If you're ever thirsty, the Saloon is the place to be.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.fri4: I don't actually drink very much myself. I'm mainly doing this to make a living.#$e#Although I do enjoy a taste of the Stardew Valley vintage from time to time.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.gift_taste.disliked: Hmm... this isn't really what I had in mind. But thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.gift_taste.hated: Ugh... I really don't like this. No offense.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.gift_taste.liked: Hey, thanks! I appreciate the thought.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.gift_taste.loved: Oh! This is wonderful! You really know what I like, @!$h
stardewcraft.npc.gus.greenrain: I saw the weather report last night. It really gave me a scare!$s#$e#Are there monsters out there? What's happening?
stardewcraft.npc.gus.greenrain_2: *sniff*... These rains have a particular smell. Have you noticed? Almost like freshly minced herbs...
stardewcraft.npc.gus.greenrainfinished: I'm glad that's over. Running the saloon is enough to worry about, I don't need exotic weather in my life!
stardewcraft.npc.gus.introduction: Well hello there! I'm Gus, chef and owner of the Stardrop Saloon.#$e#Stop in if you need any refreshments. I've always got hot coffee and cold beer at the ready.$h
stardewcraft.npc.gus.married: Hey @, just want to say that I'm happy for you and %spouse.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.mon: Yeah, I know a lot about the people living here.#$e#That's one of the benefits of being a bartender.$h#$e#Sometimes I hear too much...
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon: Welcome to the Stardrop Saloon! Can I get you anything?
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon4: Hi there, @. Make yourself at home.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon8: Hi there @. I'm glad to see you! You're always welcome here.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon_fri: Business has been really good tonight. I'm pleased.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon_thu: Hey, you look like you could use a beverage.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon_tue: Hi! Please relax and enjoy yourself.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.sat: Are you much of a chef, @?#$e#If you have a kitchen and some recipes, you can cook some useful dishes.#$e#Home-cooked meals make great gifts, as well.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.sun: Business has been pretty steady thanks to my regular customers.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.thu: Pam and Clint come into the saloon almost every night.#$e#I'd probably go out of business if they stopped coming.$h#$e#So make sure you don't drive them away!
stardewcraft.npc.gus.thu6: Clint comes into the saloon almost every night and sits at the same table by himself.#$e#Sometimes he glances over at Emily with a nervous look. Hmmm.#$e#Maybe that's why he comes in so often. Oh well, that means more business for me.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.thu8: Pam comes into the saloon almost every night and drinks way too much beer.#$e#Ah well, I shouldn't pass judgment on my customers.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.tue: I sell different dishes each week, so make sure and check in every now and then!#$e#You might taste something spectacular.$h#$e#Just let me know if you have any allergies.$s#$e#Okay, see you around.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.wed: Emily's been working here for a while now. I don't know what I'd do without her!#$e#I would hate to have to clean all those pots by myself.$s
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptbirthdaygif: Awwwww, you got me a birthday gift? Well, I really like it!$h
*gasp*... You got this for me? Wow, @, this is the best birthday gift ever!$h
Gross! You got me this on my birthday? What's wrong with you!$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptgift_(o)421: Wow, they're beautiful! These are my absolute favorite.$h
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptgift_(o)88: $c 0.8#Is that... coconut? I love this!$h#Mmm.... coconuts remind me of warm, sunny days at the beach. When I hold one, I feel like I'm there... even when it's raining.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptgift_(o)sta: For me? Ooooh... I can't decide if I should drink it, or use it as shampoo...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.breakup: Agh!$8#$b#Oh... hmph. Beat me to it, huh? Alright...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.cropmatured_421: My name means 'field of hay', but I like to imagine it as a meadow full of sunflowers...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.dating_haley: I was waiting for you to ask me that.$l
stardewcraft.npc.haley.dating_haley_memo: You look really handsome today.$l^You look really pretty today.$l
So, what's the idea here... am I just going to be your 'girlfriend' forever...?$7
stardewcraft.npc.haley.divorced: I'll be fine on my own...$7#$e#Thanks for the memories.$7#$e#Why are you still clinging to me? Go live your own life.$7
stardewcraft.npc.haley.divorced_emily: Things didn't work out between you and Emily, huh? Well... It happens.#$e#It *is* kind of awkward that you're both still living in this tiny town, though.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.dumped_girls: I've got nothing to say to you!$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_beach1: No, you won't! This bracelet was passed down to me by my great-grandmother!$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_beach2: *sigh*$s#$b#...Maybe it'll wash up on another shore. I can't bear to think of it at the bottom of the ocean.$s
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_clean2: NO!! I'm not going to do it!$a#$b#You guys are both stupid!%fork$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_clean3: She should take the 'high road'? What's that supposed to mean?$u#$b#You think I'm being a baby, huh?%fork$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_darkroom2: Oh! I thought you knew.#$b#This room's for developing photos.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_darkroom5: Oh! I thought you knew.#$b#This room's for developing photos.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_jar1: Great, then you shouldn't have any problem opening this jar for me!$h
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_jar2: Oh... you aren't? Hmmm...$s#$b#Well could you try opening this jar for me anyways?
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_room1: Him? No!#$b#...Well, I guess I used to like Alex. But not anymore! He's immature.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_room2: What? That sounds fun, but I wouldn't want to leave Stardew Valley right now...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.eventseen_11_memo: The other day, Emily baked something called a 'squirrel loaf'...$u#$e#How'd it taste? Um... well, if my tail was a little bushier I probably would've loved it.$h
Did you see last night's episode of 'Tears'? *sob*... I can't believe Kyle and Amy broke up...$s
stardewcraft.npc.haley.eventseen_12_memo: Wow, looks like someone's read the latest issue of 'Super Fashion Girl'... muddy boots are totally in right now!$h

My parents sent another postcard... I guess they're in the middle of a cruise down the Gem Sea Coast.#$e#They said me and Emily could join them at any point, but let's be honest... who wants to go on vacation with their parents?
stardewcraft.npc.haley.eventseen_13_memo: %Haley greets you with a smile. You notice that she's wearing her Great-Grandma's bracelet.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.eventseen_14: It was fun taking pictures, but I had to shower for two hours to get the mud out of my hair!$h
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_fri: Is that a grass stain on your knee?#$e#Sorry, I'm allergic to grass.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_fri4: You look like you've been doing a lot of hard work.#$b#Why don't you take the rest of the day off?
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_mon: It's gross when all these fallen leaves get slimy.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_mon10: @, I'm happy to see you today.$h
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_mon6: $p 48#Did I ever tell you I found another one of my great-grandma's bracelets in the attic?|See this bracelet? It belonged to my great-grandmother.#$e#She was a really interesting lady.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sat: It's too cold to go to the beach anymore.#$q 44 fall_Sat_old#*sigh*...what do you think I should do today?#$r 44 10 fall_Sat_12#Watercolor painting#$r 44 20 fall_Sat_12#Relax and read a magazine#$r 44 -30 fall_Sat_13#Stop being a selfish crybaby
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sat_12: Hmm... That's a pretty good idea, actually.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sat_13: Get away from me, you stupid jerk.$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sun: I've never been to the forest. It's muddy and I could get a blister on my foot.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sun6: I've never been to the forest, you know.#$e#It might be interesting to explore it some day.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_thu: I feel the urge to go shopping. *sigh*
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_thu6: Shopping just doesn't sound as fun as it used to.#$e#What's happening to me?#$e#Hmm...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_tue: Hmm... Something smells weird...#$e#You've been working on the farm, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_tue2: Something smells earthy...#$b#Oh, right. You work on a farm.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_tue8: I'm starting to like the smell of dirt. Isn't that weird?#$e#I think it's because you're around all the time.$h
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_wed: Oh, hi. Did you want something?
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_wed4: If you're ever bored, come say hi.
