stardewcraft.npc.maru.tue: Have you met my mother? She's the town's carpenter.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.tue2: Stop by our house when you need to upgrade your buildings.#$e#It's always nice to have visitors.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.wed: On Tuesdays and Thursdays I work at Harvey's clinic.#$b#He says he likes having me around in case his medical equipment goes haywire!$h#$e#Being a farmer must be pretty easy, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.maru.wed8: I'm glad to have a job at the clinic... I feel like I'm helping people in town.#$e#Dr. Harvey? He's nice, but not really my type...
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_fri: I hope I don't catch the flu this year.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_fri6: You look fresh today. I guess it's that crisp winter air.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_mon: Did you see the snowman I built?$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_mon8: Hi @!$h#$e#Hey, don't you think my snowman looks kind of like you?
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_sat: Have you built a furnace yet?#$e#You can use them to turn raw material like ores into more useful products.$u
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_sat2: Hey, if any of your farming machines need to be fixed, just let me know.$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_sun: I get so sleepy when it's cold...
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_thu: Hey! What's up?#$e#It's a good time to explore the caves.#$e#I would go but my Dad would flip.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_thu10: @, come closer. I'm cold.$l#$e#My hands are so dry from the winter air. I'm sorry about that.$l
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_tue: My hair gets so frizzy in this dry weather. *sigh*
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_tue4: Hey, do you have any ideas for a new gadget I can make?#$e#Mhmm. I trust your opinion.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.winter_wed: I guess winter is a good time to work on my gadgets.#$e#I wonder if I could make anything useful for farmers?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.acceptgift_(o)stard: Well I'll be darned... I never expected to get a gift like this. You made my day, kid!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.cc_bus: Hey, did you hear about the ol' bus?#$b#Yep... I'm back on the saddle, kid... hehe. Feels nice.$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.divorced_penny: Penny came home crying... what'd you do to her?$3
stardewcraft.npc.pam.event_credit1: Hey, watch your mouth! No one tells me what to do!$u
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_fri: Every day is the same old routine...$s#$e#Do you ever have that problem, farmer?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_sat: Would you do me a kindness and clean up my house?#$e#Just kidding.$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_sun: Don't you have work to do?#$e#You should be thankful that you have a job rather than moping around town all the time.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_sun4: I miss my old truck driving job. I used to go all around the valley, meetin' people, listenin' to the radio.#$e#Times sure do change.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_thu: Penny's the only one I've got, so you best treat her kindly.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_tue: If I knew you better, I'd be more inclined to chat.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_tue4: I used to be young, once. Hard to believe, huh?#$e#Time sure goes fast when you grow up.$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fall_wed: *Sigh*... I guess I'll be popping a frozen dinner into the microwave tonight.$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fri: Each day's just the same as the last...$s#$b#If only I'd been born rich...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.fri2: You know, I've been thinking... I wish I had a hobby. Something to do other than hanging around at that saloon every night.#$e#You got any ideas?#$e#...Ehh. Maybe I'll play checkers against myself.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.gift_taste.disliked: Hmm... that's not really my thing, kid.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.gift_taste.hated: Ugh. Get that outta my face!$a
stardewcraft.npc.pam.gift_taste.liked: Hey, that's not bad at all! Thanks, kid.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.gift_taste.loved: Well, I'll be darned... This is great! Thanks, kid!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.greenrain: It's a sign from the Almighty... We're doomed...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.greenrain_2: I think these rains are a show of force... a warning.#$b#You could say it's from nature, from Yoba, whatever you like... but that's what I think.#$e#What I mean is, we can't get too cocky. Or else, instead of a green rain, maybe we'll have a blood-red rain... See what I mean?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.greenrainfinished: Well, I guess the end-times haven't come just yet, kid...#$e#Ah well, back to the ol' nine to five...
stardewcraft.npc.pam.introduction: Hey, kid. The name's Pam.#$e#Don't be a jerk and we'll get along fine.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.married_alex: So, you married the Mullner boy, huh?#$b#Will you be takin' that smelly old dog with ya, too?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.married_penny: I'll really miss that girl...$s#$b#You treat my Penny good, now. You hear me?$u
stardewcraft.npc.pam.mon: Urghh... my head...$s#$e#You know, I'd eat healthier food if I could afford it.#$e#Hey, you probably have a lot of tasty grub growin' on your farm, hm?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.movieinvitation: Date night with ol' Pam, huh? Hah!$h#$b#Sure thing, kid... I'll see you there.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.pamhouseupgrade: I can't believe you bought me a house! Is there any catch?#$e#Sorry, I'm not used to people being so nice...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.pamhouseupgrade_mem: I'm loving the new house. Thanks again, kid!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.pamhouseupgradeanon: I can't believe someone bought me a house! I wonder if it's some kind of scam?#$e#Sorry, I'm not used to people being so nice...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.reject_867: Wow, would you look at that... It's like something out of the future.#$b#Hehe, sorry kid... I can't use that. There's more buttons than I have brain cells!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.resort: Heh... Willy gave us each a piece of his fish jerky on the ride over. Delicious!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.resort_bar: It's a special occasion, kid... I'm ordering something unique. Make it a double!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.resort_chair: Now this is comfort! I might even take my shoes off!$h#$e#Better not look too closely at my feet, kid.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.resort_shore: Looks like there's some unique fish swimmin' around. Next time I'll have to bring my pole!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.saloon: Nothin' like a sip o' the good stuff to warm these old bones...$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.saloon6: Hey, kid. I'd buy you a drink if I could afford it!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.saloon_fri: Oi, Gus! Gimme another pint of your strongest!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.saloon_sun: %Pam seems out of it. Better leave her alone right now.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.saloon_thu: *gulp* ... I've been looking forward to this beverage all afternoon. Heh heh.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.saloon_wed: *Sigh*... Hey, kid. You're too young to be moping around in a place like this.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.sat: Make sure your boots are clean before you go stompin' around in my house.$u#$e#It's annoying to clean a mess. You should know that by now.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.sat4: I wish a team of elves would come during the night and tidy up my house. Hahahaha.$h#$e#I could sure go for some parsnips.#$e#If my legs weren't so stiff I'd visit the mountains every now and then.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.structurebuilt_fish: Heard you got a fish pond built... Heh, I grew up with a fish pond.#$b#You can raise just about anything in one of those... But some of the fancier fish are real fussy!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_fri: ...Yeah?#$e#You're a fine lookin' young person. Why're you wastin' your time talkin' to someone like me?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_sat: Someone's been complainin' about my yard... sayin' it's a mess. Was it you?$u#$e#Hmmm...
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_sat2: Don't mind that ol' dog next to the house.#$b#He might look at you cross, but he'll never get up from that box in a hunderd years.#$b#The old boy's name? It's Dusty.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_thu: Oh, hi there, farmer.#$e#I don't often chit-chat with strangers.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_thu4: I always seem to end up at the saloon at some point.#$e#It's too close to my house. It ain't healthy.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_tue2: Oh, it's @.#$e#Do you need my help or something?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_tue6: I had hopes and dreams like you, once... But look at me now.$s#$e#Life doesn't always turn out like you expect.#$e#Ah well. There's no sense dwellin' on what you don't have.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_wed: Havin' a local farm is good for our town.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.summer_wed4: Maybe if you do real well on your farm it'll boost the local economy.#$e#Then everyone will have a job and we'll all be happy, right?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.sun: Are you friends with Gus? He's a pretty good guy.#$e#He even gives me free beer on my birthday.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.thu: My house ain't pretty but at least it's by the river.#$e#Hey. Penny's my baby girl. Be nice to her or leave her alone, got it?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.thu4: Penny says I spend too much time at the saloon...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.thu4_inlaw_penny: It's awful lonely at home all by myself...
stardewcraft.npc.pam.tue: Hey, you! Don't be snoopin' around the trailer when I'm out. Got it?$u#$e#Sorry, but I gotta be cautious with strangers.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.tue2: I was reading the newspaper this morning but then I got depressed. It's a rotten world, kid.#$e#Keep your head screwed on right and you'll make it through in one piece...#$b#That's what my Pappy always used to say. Heh heh heh.$h
stardewcraft.npc.pam.wed: Times have been tough lately. I got laid off of my job as a bus driver. If I got that job back I could drive you to Calico Desert.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_fri: Penny sure does like old books. I think she's a heck of a lot smarter than I ever was.#$e#I'm glad.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_mon: You got any hogs on that farm?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_sat: I oughta take up fishin', seein' as how close the river is.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_sun: Blah... my front yard's a mess.$s
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_thu: It's awful cold. A visit to the saloon should warm me up, don't you think? Heh heh.#$e#Why don't you swing by the saloon later for a taste o' the Oh-Be-Joyful?
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_tue: Do you want somethin' from me, kid? Best look somewhere else.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_tue4: I just hope Penny has a good life ahead of her. If you ever have kids you'll know how I feel.#$e#...It's so dry in winter. My skin feels like old parchment.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_tue4_inlaw_p: Hey. You better be treatin' Penny right on that old farm of yours. She's the only one I got!
stardewcraft.npc.pam.winter_wed: Hey kid. What're you up to?#$e#I'm just passin' time, same as always.
stardewcraft.npc.pam.wonicefishing: Alright, alright... you beat me fair and square at the fishing event, kid.#$e#Hmm... maybe my problem was using that beer-battered mushroom as bait...$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.acceptbirthdaygif: Oh! Is this for me? For... for my birthday?$3#$b#*sniff*... Sorry.$s#$b#I'm... just not used to such kindness...#$b#... I love it, though. It's perfect. Thank you so much.
For my birthday? That's so kind of you! Let me unwrap it...$h#$b#...What!?$12#$b#...Oh, I see. It's a cruel joke.$s#$b#Silly me, I should've known better...$s
For my birthday? That's so nice of you! It's a great gift.$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.acceptgift_(o)sta: Mmm... it's so fragrant. I'm going to love this.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.acceptgift_positi: Wow... this looks really old. I'll have to ask Gunther about it. Thank you!$h
Thank you! I'm almost finished with a book right now, but I'll read this one next!$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.breakup: ...$s#$b#I... I see... *sniff* ... W... We can just be friends, then.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.dating_maru_memor: Hi, @. Maru told me the news... I'm happy for you two!$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.dating_penny: I... I don't know what to say. I'm so happy...$l
stardewcraft.npc.penny.dating_penny_memo: Suddenly, the world looks a lot more beautiful, don't you think?
I'm trying to finish this book, but I keep getting distracted thinking of you.$l
I never thought my life would be more exciting than a novel, but it sure feels that way right now!$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.dumped_girls: I can't bear to see you...$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_cook1: You really mean it? Thank you! ... it's such a relief to hear that.$h#$b#I've been working so hard on this recipe, and I'm really proud of it.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_mail1: Thank you...$l#$b#I just wish George wasn't so upset... I was only trying to help.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_mail2: Oh... I guess you're right.$l#$b#I'm sorry, Mr. Mullner. It was rude, what I did.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_old1: I guess you're right... why stress out about something you can't change?$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_old2: You're right, we shouldn't ignore the reality of aging.$u#$b#I guess the sooner we come to terms with our mortality, the more time we can spend really living in the here-and-now.$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_old3: That's nice of you to say... I totally agree with you.#$b#We should treat our elders with the same respect we hope to receive ourselves some day.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_old4: That's a horrible thing to say. Life is a precious thing to waste like that!$a
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_pool2: Really? I thought you'd have noticed by now...$8
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_pool4: ...Oh, @. I thought you did, but I wasn't sure.$6#$b#...I'll always remember this night.$6
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_speaker_kid: Oh no?$l#$b#Well, I guess that makes sense... you're busy with other things right now.
... Me too. I'm glad you feel that way.$7
Yes... the urge to care for something innocent and helpless. It makes sense that we'd feel that.
Oh, really?$s#$b# I think you'd make a good parent.$7
hmm...$s#$b#If everyone thought like that, humans would die out.$s
Oh...$s#$b#That's kind of sad... but I guess I can understand your point.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_speaker_no: Really?... Uh... Well, alright. I guess I'll see you later then.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.event_speaker_yes: Great!$h#$b#Let me just call the children over.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.eventseen_34_memo: I'm teaching the kids about art history this week.#$b#It can be a little dry for the kids, so I'm having them learn by drawing a picture in the predominant style of each century.#$b#It's really been a hit!$h
I've been teaching Jas and Vincent about Dwarvish Archaeology...#$b#Jas is curious about the origins of the Dwarves... but Vincent is mainly interested in dwarvish weapons!$h
Vincent has been asking me about slugs for weeks... so I prepared a whole lesson on them. They're actually pretty interesting!#$e#Whenever I see a banana slug, I feel like it's a sign of good luck.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.eventseen_35_memo: I was just wondering what you thought...
I've been reading a book about the ocean. It accounts for most of the area of the world, and yet we hardly know anything about it!
stardewcraft.npc.penny.eventseen_36_memo: Oh, pardon this bandage on my hand...$s#$b#I went over to Maru's the other day and she showed me a new gadget of hers. The darn thing charred my palm!$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_fri: Fall is a sad time of year for me...$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_fri6: When I was a little girl, my father abandoned us because he said he felt 'trapped'. We haven't seen him since.$s#$b#I'm sorry to make things uncomfortable for you... It's just that this time of year makes me think of it for some reason.$u#$e#Anyway... How's the farming life going?
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_mon: Hi... Um, are you doing okay?$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_mon4: It's kind of embarrassing to be the only family in town who lives in a trailer.$u#$e#I wish I could live in a nice house, someday.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_sat8: Hi @.$h#$e#Your farmhouse must be pretty easy to clean, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_sun10: @! I was just thinking about the future...#$e#Where do you picture yourself in ten years?$l#$e#I have a few ideas for myself...$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_thu6: Mom doesn't take very good care of herself...$u#$e#I worry about her.$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fall_tue4: Your farm looks really pretty right now.$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.flowerdance_accep: Oh... with me? Yes, of course!$h#$b#...Will you take the lead, though? I'm nervous...$12
I accept!$h#$b#*whisper* Thanks for going through with the formalities, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fri: If you dig in the dirt you can find some interesting things.#$e#One time I found a really old piece of pottery. I brought it to Gunther and he said it was over a thousand years old.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fri4: Dishes, dishes, dishes. Ugh... If my mother wasn't always nursing a headache from her late nights at the saloon, maybe she could help around the house a little.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.fri8: I shouldn't complain so much about chores... some people in the world are really struggling, and here I am complaining about doing dishes...$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.gift_taste.hated: Ugh...I'm sorry, but I absolutely hate this.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.gift_taste.loved: Thank you! I really love this!
stardewcraft.npc.penny.greenrain: Are you alright? We're all wondering what's going on...$3
stardewcraft.npc.penny.greenrain_2: This strange weather is a good opportunity to get the kids interested in nature!$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.married_maru: That was a beautiful wedding. I know Maru will make you very happy, she's a great person.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.married_sam: Congratulations, @. Sam's a lot of fun, I'm sure you'll never have a dull moment!
stardewcraft.npc.penny.mon4: *sigh*... My mother definitely has a problem with going to the saloon too much.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.mon8: I'm eager to move out. It's such a burden to be worrying about Mom all the time.#$e#I want her to be happy, but I can't stay here forever... you know?$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.mon_7: That's how I feel. I'm just going to focus on making the future better.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.mon_8: Maybe you're right. It's better to cope with reality.$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.mon_old: But if I keep trying I think I can get her to change.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.pamhouseupgrade: What you did for my family is so generous. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.penny.pamhouseupgradean: There are some truly wonderful people in the world...
stardewcraft.npc.penny.resort: This sand is so soft and fine. It feels great on my toes!$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.resort_shore: I'm a little embarrassed wearing my bathing suit in public.$s#$b#I hope no one's looking...$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.resort_shore_2: Somehow, the water here looks so different...#$e#I can hardly believe this is the same ocean I've been gazing at my entire life.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.resort_towel: The wind keeps making me lose my page, but it feels really great on the skin.$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.resort_towel_2: I'm reading a book about a sailor who washes up on a deserted island.#$b#I wonder what I would do in that sort of a situation?
stardewcraft.npc.penny.resort_towel_2_ma: Hey honey, do you mind standing a little to the left?#$b#Thanks, the sun was making it a little bit hard to read!$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.sat: This is such a small town. You can't avoid meeting everyone.#$e#I wonder what it's like to live in the city?
stardewcraft.npc.penny.sat2: Mom's been complaining ever since JojaMart closed down. I think it's good for her, though. Maybe she'll drink less Joja Cola now.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.secondchance_girl: You've left a permanent scar on my heart, @. Still... I'm ready to speak to you again.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.summer_fri: My mother used to drive the bus to Calico Desert... but the bus stopped working a few years ago. Mayor says there's not enough money in the town coffers, or else he'd have it fixed.$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.summer_mon: Hi... Um, nice weather, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.penny.summer_mon4: Hello, @. It's nice to see you're doing well.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.summer_sat: Hello. Ummm...$u#$b#The mountains look nice today, don't they?$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.summer_sun: So... do you like to decorate your farm house?#$e#It must be nice having your own place to decorate.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.sun: Hello. Ummm...$u#$b#The weather's interesting today, don't you think?#$e#Sorry...$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.sun4: I've been trying to keep our place clean, but it always gets messy again.$s#$e#It's hard to run a household all by yourself.$u
stardewcraft.npc.penny.thu: We're very lucky to have a library in such a small town.#$e#When you're lost in a book, it's easy to forget the realities of your life.$u#$e#...Maybe that's why I like reading so much.$s#$e#...Sorry. I got carried away there.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.thu6: I wish I could keep a garden, but our yard is such a mess.$u#$e#Maybe I'll live in a place where I can have a garden someday.#$e#Maybe I'll live on a farm! *giggle*$h
stardewcraft.npc.penny.tue: I'm tutoring Vincent and Jas today... They're a handful, but it's nice to make a difference in someone's life.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.tue10: Um, @? A farm seems like a good place for children, don't you think?$l#$e#It was just a thought I had.$l
stardewcraft.npc.penny.tue4: I'm trying to save money from my tutoring job, but it's hard with my mother out of work.$s
stardewcraft.npc.penny.wed: We don't have a school here but I'm doing my best to give Vincent and Jas a proper education.#$e#Every child deserves a chance to be successful.#$e#Jas is very good at math and reading. Vincent is good at... well, he has an active imagination!
stardewcraft.npc.penny.wed2: You know what? I should take the children on a field trip some time. Maybe to the forest.#$e#A guest speaker would be nice... maybe someone familiar with nature?#$e#Sorry, I'm just thinking out loud.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.wed4: I've lived in Pelican Town my whole life. Can you believe that?#$e#I guess there's a lot out there I'll never experience.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.winter_fri2: Are you friends with Linus? He lives in a tent up in the mountains.#$e#Everyone ignores him, the poor guy. He's actually really nice... Just a little odd.#$e#It must be so cold to live in a tent this time of year.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.winter_mon: On the 25th we'll be having the Feast of the Winter Star. It's one of my favorite events.#$e#It's supposed to be a time to show gratitude for all the good things in your life... but for most people it's just a time to relax and exchange gifts.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.winter_thu: Oh... hi. You want to talk?$u#$e#If you find any interesting artifacts or minerals, Gunther will gladly display them in the museum.#$e#He told me he has special gifts for people who donate.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.winter_tue: I try to stay indoors as much as possible during the winter. I hate being cold.
stardewcraft.npc.penny.winter_tue4: I'm looking forward to seeing what your farm looks like in the spring.#$e#It's going to be so fresh and beautiful.$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.acceptgift_(o)bo: Gripping! Fascinating! It's the perfect book for me!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.acceptgift_(o)st: Wow, I can't believe you'd give this to me. It must've cost you a fortune! Thanks!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.cc_complete: This is a dream-come-true! You can't begin to imagine how much stress JojaMart was causing me.#$e#For a small town like this, one store is enough! There's too much social pressure for me to overcharge, anyway.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.event_naga1: Thanks, I appreciate that. Just forget you ever saw this, okay?$h#$b#...And I'll just forget that you were snooping around in my bedroom!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.event_naga2: You would really do that to me? You're terrible.$s#$b#You shouldn't have been snooping around in my bedroom in the first place! Nosy neighbors are the worst.$3
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.eventseen_310276: How can I possibly compete with Joja?$s#$e#Their pockets are so deep, they can just sell at a loss until little guys like me are out of business... then they'll jack up their prices!$s
I'm determined to keep my shop running until the bitter end.$s#$b#Morris and his cronies will have to drag me out from behind the counter, kicking and screaming!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.eventseen_4: Abigail's going through a rebellious phase... I get it.#$e#She'll wise up when she has to make her first mortgage payment!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fair_judged_play: It feels great to be on top! Hah!$h#$e#Nice effort, though.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fall_fri: Hi there. Is your farm still doing well?#$e#Maybe a few of my seeds will spruce things up.$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fall_mon: Fall seeds are here! Crops don't grow in winter so this is your last shot until spring.#$b#Better go all out, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fall_sat: I'm happy to buy whatever you produce on the farm.#$e#Yes, I do resell it for a profit... but that's the benefit of being an established shop owner.#$e#Don't get any ideas...
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fall_sun: If I didn't have this shop to run I would be outside right now...#$e#The leaves look great and the mushrooms are sprouting.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fall_thu: It's starting to get cold outside...#$b#That means more people come into the shop to warm up... Hehe.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.fri: Hi there. Is your farm doing well?#$e#Maybe a few of my seeds will spruce things up.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.gift_taste.hated: Please, never bring this to me again.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.gift_taste.liked: That's very kind of you. I like this.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.gift_taste.loved: This is my all-time favorite! Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.greenrain: Gahh, no customers! Any more of this 'green' rain, and my ledger will be in the 'red'!$s
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.greenrain_2: Glad to see you, @. What's a little toxic rain when you have seeds to buy?$h#$e#I'm just kidding. The rain seems to be completely harmless.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.greenrainfinishe: Well, I'm glad things are back to normal. Seems like it was all overblown... just like everything.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.introduction: Hey, it's the new farmer! I'm Pierre, owner of the local general store.#$b#If you're looking for seeds, my shop is the place to go. I'll also buy produce from you for a good price!#$e#A little agriculture could really inject new life into the local economy!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.joja_begin: This is a sad day for Pelican Town... The stronger Joja becomes, the closer I move toward bankruptcy. I might have to sell the shop soon...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.married: Well, now that you have dual incomes, I expect you'll be purchasing twice as many seeds, right?$h#$b#Haha... I'm only joking.... *ahem*...
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.mon: Welcome! If you're looking for seeds, you've come to the right place!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.mon4: Hi, @. Need any seeds or fruit tree saplings?
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.mon4_inlaw_abiga: Hi, @. How's Abigail doing? The shop hasn't been the same without her...
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.movieinvitation: Hey, that's a great idea... It'll be nice to get out from behind the counter. I'll meet you there!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.resort: I'm losing a lot of money being away from the shop...$s#$b#But, you know what? It's worth it.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.resort_bar: Drink after drink... Gus must be making a killing!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.resort_chair: Eh, let the kids play in the sun. I'll just sit in this chair.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.resort_shore: Mmm... that salty smell of the sea is making me want some sashimi.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.sat: If you find any wild produce, I'll take it off your hands for a reasonable price.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.sat8: I'll tell you a secret. Sometimes, when the store is empty, I'll practice my opera singing behind the counter.$h#$e#Don't tell anyone.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_fri: Oh, hi. Are you satisfied with the quality of my summer seeds?
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_mon: I've got summer seeds available! You'd better stock up.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_sat: Summer is a good time to eat a refreshing salad, don't you think?
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_sun: Ugh... It's so hot in here.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_thu: Everyone's enjoying the weather instead of shopping... *sigh*
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_wed: Now that Joja is gone, I feel a responsibility to keep the shop open seven days a week. People need groceries!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.summer_wed2: Now that Joja is gone, I feel a responsibility to keep the shop open seven days a week. People need groceries!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.sun: I wish I could go for a walk, but I can't leave the store unattended.#$e#I've heard the flowers are in bloom and the air smells great...$s
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.thu: I'm happy to buy any produce off you.#$b#I'll give you a fair price, of course!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.thu2: I really do appreciate your business, @. I've been having a harder and harder time turning a decent profit.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.thu4: Hey, @. You're my number one customer!
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.thu8: Does Abigail look anything like me? Don't tell my wife, but sometimes I wonder if I'm really the father.$s#$e#Don't tell my wife, but I hate to cook dinner.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.tue: Sometimes I get new items in stock, so make sure to stop by every so often.#$e#It's a lot of work to run a shop.$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.tue6: You know, I used to be a pretty good boxer back in the day... my right hook was the stuff of legend!$h
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.wed: If you find any wild produce, I'll take it off your hands for a reasonable price.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.wed4: *sigh*... No matter how well the business does, it's never enough to satisfy my desire for success. What's wrong with me? Maybe I'm just bored with domestic life.$s#$e#When I was younger I always had something interesting to do... now I find myself just wasting time whenever I'm not at work.$s
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.wed6: Business has been pretty good since JojaMart closed down.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.winter_fri: I mainly deal in edibles, so if you've got any ores or wood you'd better try selling them somewhere else.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.winter_mon: You can't grow any crops during winter... so I have no seeds to offer you.#$e#It's really going to cut into our profits.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.winter_sat: Is it just me or is there a cold draft in here?
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.winter_sun: If I didn't have this shop to run I would be outside right now.#$e#It would be fun to throw a snowball.
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.winter_thu: Hi. In the mood for a little shopping?
stardewcraft.npc.pierre.winter_wed: Now that Joja is gone, I feel a responsibility to keep the shop open seven days a week. People need groceries!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.acceptgift_(o)boo: What's this... 'Woody's Secret'? ... Um, what kind of book is this, @?$6#$b#Oh, it's about woodcutting! Hahaha... Oh yeah, I'm going to love this. Thanks!$4
stardewcraft.npc.robin.acceptgift_(o)ski: Ah, 'Woodcutter's Weekly'... I was hoping to get my hands on the newest issue! They've got all the latest techniques in here!#$b#From one woodcutter to another... Thank you.$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.acceptgift_(o)sta: Wait a sec... you're giving me this? What a special treat! Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.cc_begin: Hey! I heard that Lewis showed you around the Community Center... It'd be great if you could fix that place up. It used to be a really nice building!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.cc_bridge: Hey! I heard some weird noises last night, and woke up this morning to find the quarry bridge completely repaired!#$b#It's a miracle of woodworking!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.cc_complete: I knew it from the moment you stepped off that bus, @... you were destined to be a town hero!$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.divorced_maru: Maru was crying through the night... We're all devastated...$s
stardewcraft.npc.robin.divorced_sebastia: Sebastian's back in the basement... what happened between you two?$s
stardewcraft.npc.robin.event_wood1: Great, then this blueprint should be a piece of cake for you!$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.event_wood2: Well, then I have the perfect blueprint to get you started!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fall_fri: Have you met the wild man that lives behind our house?$s#$e#I guess I don't really mind, as long as he doesn't bother us.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fall_mon: Maru likes gems. She uses them in her inventions.#$e#So how are you and Maru getting along?
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fall_thu: You're always welcome to visit us, even if you aren't in the market for a building upgrade!$h#$e#It can get pretty lonely up here in the mountains.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fri: You've met my son Sebastian, right? He lives downstairs.#$e#He's a little shy, but I'm sure he'll warm up to you if you're nice to him.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fri4: I found an ashtray in Sebastian's room, and it smelled really weird. Should I be worried about this?#$e#Sometimes I worry about Sebastian... he doesn't have many friends and doesn't really seem to care about his future very much...#$e#I would talk to him about it but he never opens up to me.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fri4_inlaw_sebast: Sebastian told me he's trying to quit smoking! I'm really proud of him.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.fri_inlaw_sebasti: I miss my Sebby... he was always a little misunderstood, but I believed in him.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.gift_taste.loved: This is for me? Wow, I absolutely love it!!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.gift_taste.neutra: Thank you. This might come in handy.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.greenrain: That man is insane! Why does he have to go out there? We have no idea if this rain is dangerous!$u
stardewcraft.npc.robin.greenrain_2: There's all kinds of good wood out there today. Better get chopping, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.robin.greenrainfinished: I hope Demetrius is happy with the 'samples' he collected. Seems like his little science project is more important to him than his own wife. Hmmph.$6
stardewcraft.npc.robin.houseupgrade_1: It was fun working on your house. That might be some of the finest construction I've ever done!$h#$e#I hope you're enjoying the new kitchen.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.houseupgrade_2: What are you going to do with all that new space in your house?#$e#Or perhaps I should call it... your 'mansion'?$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.houseupgrade_3: So, are you getting into the aged wine business? I've heard it's very lucrative... if you have the patience.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.introduction: Have you met everyone in town yet? That sounds exhausting.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.married_maru: We'll all miss having Maru around the house, but I'm sure we'll still see her often!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.married_sebastian: Oh, don't worry... these are tears of joy. I know Sebastian will be very happy on %farm Farm!$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.mon: Have I told you that I built our house from the ground up?#$e#It's definitely been the highlight of my career so far.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.movieinvitation: Ooh... Two tickets for tonight's show, huh? Sounds good! I'll meet you there.$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.pamhouseupgrade: Our little plan worked out well, don't you think? Pam and Penny seem really happy.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.pamhouseupgradean: Our little plan worked out well, don't you think? Pam and Penny seem really happy.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.reject_865: Veggie salt? Sounds good, but I don't need it.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.reject_866: Hmm... when I think of flowers, I think of Evelyn. Maybe show this to her?
stardewcraft.npc.robin.resort: Wow, look at these structures!$h#$b#I can tell they were made by a master builder. I'm really impressed!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.resort_chair: Hey @. You know, I was just thinking about how far the town has come since you first moved here.#$b#You should really be proud of all you've done!$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.resort_shore: Hey, look! I can see another island from here.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.sat: Our house is in such a beautiful area, don't you think?#$e#I love the fresh air of the mountains.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.structurebuilt_ba: Are you satisfied with the new barn? I'm sure you'll raise some very happy livestock in there!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.structurebuilt_co: That's probably the sturdiest coop I've ever built. Hope you get a lot of use out of it!
How's that new coop treatin' ya? I'll be excited to meet your new animals!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.structurebuilt_fi: I mentioned to Willy that you got a new fish pond. He seemed really happy about it.#$e#Apparently, he raised crabs when he was a young man. Called it a 'time-honored tradition'.$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.structurebuilt_sh: So, what are your plans with the new shed? The possibilities are endless!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.structurebuilt_sl: *phew*... Building that slime hutch was a lot of work... I'll need a day at the spa to recuperate!$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.structurebuilt_st: So, have you been riding your new horse around town?#$b#I imagine you're pretty sore, but you'll get used to it soon.$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.summer_fri: We're pretty insulated from the rest of the world here in Stardew Valley.#$e#It has its pros and cons.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.summer_mon: Wood is a wonderful substance... it's versatile, cheap, strong, and each piece has its own unique character!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.summer_tue: If you need any buildings on your farm upgraded, just ask me!#$e#You'll need to provide enough lumber and stone for the project. And it costs money, too.#$e#But I'm sure you'll be pleased with the results!$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.sun: I hope Demetrius doesn't blow the house up with those science experiments of his.#$e#I'm not even sure what he's working on. I think it has something to do with plants.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.sun2: My husband almost set the house on fire last night with his science experiment. One of his beakers exploded and sent a fireball into the rafters! Thank Yoba I used fire-resistant lacquer when I built the place.$u#$e#Sorry if it smells weird in here, @. It's my husband's bizarre science project...
stardewcraft.npc.robin.sun6: Hi @! It's good to see you.#$e#You're a regular member of the community now, don't you think?
stardewcraft.npc.robin.thu: You're always welcome to visit us, even if you aren't shopping, you know.$h#$e#It can get pretty lonely up here in the mountains.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.tue: Hey, if you need any materials or blueprints, my shop is the place you're looking for!#$e#Plus, your business supports the local economy.$h
stardewcraft.npc.robin.wed: Hey there, @.#$e#I was just daydreaming about some new carpentry projects.#$e#Are you doing OK at your place? How's the woodwork in your cottage holding up?
stardewcraft.npc.robin.winter_fri: My parents were bewildered when I told them I wanted to be a carpenter.#$e#They were pretty old-fashioned.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.winter_fri_inlaw_: I think the farm life is really healthy for Sebby.
stardewcraft.npc.robin.winter_mon: Hey, it's a perfect time of year to gather wood.#$e#Maybe you can collect enough to upgrade your house!
stardewcraft.npc.robin.winter_sat: Our house is in such a beautiful area, don't you think?#$e#Everything looks still after a fresh snow.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.10: Did you watch the game last night?#$b#Or wait, do you even have a TV set...?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.14: Ugh, I stepped in something gross earlier... and I just bought these shoes.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.acceptbirthdaygift_: Hey, hey, hey! You rememb--$h#$b#...*sniff*...*sniff*... what's that gnarly smell...?$8#$b#...Oh.$5
Hey, hey, hey! You remembered! Now that's what I'm talking about!$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.acceptgift_(o)stard: Whoaa... Hold on... this is for me? I never expected this! Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.breakup: Wait... what?!$8#$b#I thought we were doing okay... I guess I was way off... alright, then.$9#$b#Yeah, sure... we can still be friends.$9
stardewcraft.npc.sam.dating_sam: Um... So, can I get a kiss now?$l
stardewcraft.npc.sam.dating_sam_memory_o: I couldn't sleep last night. I was imagining all the things we're gonna do together.$10
stardewcraft.npc.sam.dating_sebastian: I heard you and Sebastian are going out... he better still be coming to band practice every week!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.divorced: I'm sorry, @. I don't think I can still be your friend.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.eventseen_4081148_m: Even with all the practice we did, I made a bunch of mistakes on stage... I hope no one noticed.$s#$e#It's kind of nerve-wracking to be in front of everyone!$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.eventseen_45: I better lay low for a while. I wouldn't want to get on Mayor Lewis' bad side!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.eventseen_45_memory: Wouldn't it be cool if the town had a skate park, though?#$b#Now, how to convince Mayor Lewis...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.eventseen_733330_me: If... I mean when... my Dad gets back, I wonder if he'll be the same as I remember him?$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_14: Hi @.#$e#Hmm.. I wonder if I could grow a cactus in my room?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_16: I ordered some shoes online more than a week ago! Man, they're really taking a long time.#$e#I guess we must really live in the middle of nowhere.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_23: Ah, my feet feel great in these new shoes. They're a little crisp, but they'll break in. Especially after I run through the haunted maze this weekend.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_26: Tonight, after everyone is asleep, that weird old man who lives in the woods will set up the haunted maze. He always makes sure no one is around to see him working.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_9: I ordered a new pair of shoes online. They're the same style so I know they'll fit right.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_fri: I used to live in Zuzu City, you know. The biggest difference is the noise. It's never quiet in the city.#$e#There's way more people around you, always. And it's always bright with city lights, even at night.#$e#I guess which setting you like depends on your personality.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_fri10: I think I've grown to like the country more than the city.$h#$b#Although I could be biased... for a certain reason.$10#$e#So, how are you doing today?$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_mon: Oh, hi. Are you making friends with anyone in town?#$e#Bye.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_mon2: I like taking walks in the forest this time of year. The temperature is so comfortable.#$e#...$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_sat: Hmm. I think I was meaning to do something... But I forgot.#$e#This happens to me all the time.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_sat4: I'm lucky to have the biggest room in the house to myself.#$e#I guess there's advantages to being the oldest child.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_sun: It's hard to have fun on Sunday... I keep thinking about having to go to work tomorrow.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_sun8: The first week of fall is already over. Man, that went by fast.$s#$e#Whatever. I'm just happy that you came to visit me!#$e#So do you have anything new to tell me?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_thu: Did you ever notice all the spider webs that appear during the fall?#$e#If you get up early you'll see them covered in dew... like little stars.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_thu6: I guess I should start thinking about moving out soon...$s#$e#...But I would miss Mom's fish casserole, so I dunno...$s#$e#I hate making decisions.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_thu6_1: I think my Dad might be coming back next year.#$e#I guess that's kind of soon. Weird.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_tue: My shoes always seem to wear out this time of year. Look, my toe's poking through!$h#$e#That's what happens when you skateboard too much.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_tue4: Hi, @. Do you want to hang out or something?#$e#Just stop by whenever you want.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fall_wed: Hey... something smells good, like pizza.#$e#Do you smell that? Maybe Mom's cooking something.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.firstvisit_sewer: Heheh... So you've been to the sewer, huh? I've snuck down there a few times myself. It's pretty creepy.#$e#How could I tell? Hmm... let's just say... 'the nose knows'.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.flowerdance_accept: Oh... with me? Hehe... Yeah, sure. Sounds fun!$10
stardewcraft.npc.sam.flowerdance_decline: Hmm... I dunno. Maybe next year.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fri: Did I ever tell you we used to live in the city?#$e#There's a lot more stuff going on, but it's also kinda noisy and hectic... It's hard to say which is better.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fri10: The older I get the more attached I feel to the valley.#$b#Although I could be biased... for a certain reason.$10#$e#So, how are you doing today?$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.fri4: Dad used to work as a garbage man in the city.#$e#You don't even want to know some of the things he found in people's trash.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.gift_taste.hated: You really don't get it, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.gift_taste.loved: Aw, yea! This is my absolute favorite!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.gift_taste.neutral: You got that for me? Thanks!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.greenrain: Whaa! Is it acid? Will it burn through the roof and sizzle us alive?$8#$b#I gotta keep my little brother safe!$7
stardewcraft.npc.sam.greenrain_2: You notice how warm this rain is? It feels alive...
stardewcraft.npc.sam.greenrainfinished: Seems like there's no damage to anything... That was a strange one. How are you holding up?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.introduction: Hey, I'm Sam. Good to meet you.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.married_abigail: Hey, what's the big idea? You took my drummer!$8#$b#Haha, just kidding... Congrats!$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.married_sebastian: Wow, I can't believe you and Sebastian got hitched. Times really are changing...$u#$e#Eh, it's alright, I'm sure he'll still have time to hang out.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.mon2: Hey, how's it going?#$e#Last night I practiced guitar for 4 hours straight. My fingers hurt like crazy.$s#$e#Bye, I've got something to do...
stardewcraft.npc.sam.mon8: I'll tell you a secret... my name 'Sam' is short for 'Samson'.$10#$e#Most people don't know that so keep it on mute.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.sat: Hmm. I just remembered that I was meaning to do something... But I forgot.#$e#This happens to me all the time.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.sat4: Oh! I just remembered I'm supposed to call my Grandma. Okay, I'm going to put this rubber band on my wrist so I don't forget.#$e#I have to make little reminders for myself or else I'll totally forget to do things.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.secondchance_guys: Alright, I'm done with the cold shoulder act. Let's just forget about what happened.$7
stardewcraft.npc.sam.spring_12: My little brother gets so excited for festivals. He's been talking about tomorrow's egg hunt all day.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.spring_21: Sometimes those spring petals that float around make my nose drip.$s#$e#I like summer best, myself.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.spring_23: Why couldn't the flower dance be today so I could get work off?$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_10: I don't have to work tomorrow! I've never been so happy.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_fri: You know... I used to live in the city and I have to admit, this place is much nicer in the summer.$h#$e#The city is so hot with all that concrete.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_mon: There's a little less pollen in the summer... my nose is really happy.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_mon2: Hey, how's it going?#$e#I'm hungry.#$e#See you later.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_mon6: Have you been to the desert yet?#$e#You can find some interesting things there. Dad took me a couple times when I was younger.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_sun: When you see hot air balloons drifting over the sea, you'll know that summer's in full swing.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_thu: Dad was telling me about our national enemy, the Gotoro Empire... They sound like a ruthless bunch.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_thu6_2: Sometimes I can hear my Dad pacing down the hallway at night.$s#$b#...But he won't tell us what's troubling him.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_tue: Oh, hi! It's good to see you again.#$e#Goodbye for now.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_tue4: Hi, @. Do you want to hang out or something?#$e#I'm so energized during summer I hardly have to sleep!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_wed: Hi. Taking the day off?#$e#Sounds interesting.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.summer_wed2: I saw a spider on my ceiling last night. They sure like the warmth.#$e#I hope he didn't crawl into my mouth while I was asleep...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.sun: Oh, it's a nice day... isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.sun8: Sometimes I wonder if my mother is actually happy with her life...$s#$e#I asked her once and got the feeling she was hiding some inner pain.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu: The clouds look great this time of year, don't they?#$e#Like scoops of vanilla ice cream floating on blue raspberry sauce... Or maybe I'm just hungry.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu2: My Dad is a soldier, fighting against the Gotoro Empire. That's why he's not here...#$e#He'll come back someday.#$e#...I've heard some terrible things about the Gotoro Empire...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu2_2: Well, my Dad is back. Have you met him?#$b#I'm just glad he's okay.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu6_1: I think my Dad might be coming back in a year or so.#$e#I guess you might be able to meet him, then. If you're still living here.#$e#You wouldn't abandon the farm after putting so much effort into it!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu6_2: ...I have mixed feelings about my father being back. He seems strange.$s#$b#But I guess I haven't seen him in 3 years... so that could explain it.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu_2: Well, my Dad is back. Have you met him?#$b#I'm just glad he's okay.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu_3: *sigh*... what am I still doing here?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.thu_inlaw_sam: Hey, @. Are you enjoying the married lifestyle?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.tue: Oh, hi! It's good to see you again.#$e#Take it easy.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.tue4: Hi, @. Do you want to hang out or something?#$e#Sleeping feels nice but sometimes I wish I could skip it... it's just such a time-waster.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.wed: I'm trying to come up with a new song for my band, but I'm blanking...#$e#Hey.. What do you think my new song should be about?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.wed10: Hey buddy. You look like you're full of energy today!
stardewcraft.npc.sam.wed6: I've been friends with Sebastian for a while. He's a pretty cool guy.#$e#If you two weren't around I wouldn't really have any friends in town.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_24: The Feast of the Winter Star is supposed to be a time to show gratitude for all the good things in life.#$b#Me? I'm mostly interested in the food. Hehe.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_7: One time, Gus fell in the river during the Ice Festival. We had to build a huge fire in the saloon to dry him out.#$e#We were all worried we'd never taste his famous spaghetti ever again.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_fri: The worst thing about the snow is getting your feet soaked. You're lucky in those thick boots.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_mon2: Everyone's indoors during the winter, so I can play guitar as loud as I want.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_sat4: I just remembered I need to change the strings on my guitar.#$b#Okay, I'm going to write a note on my wrist so I remember to do it tonight.#$e#I have to make little reminders for myself or else I'll totally forget to do things.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_sun: Try not to make a mess in the house or my Mom will flip.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_sun8: It would be fun if we could go sledding, wouldn't it?#$e#I don't think there are any good hills nearby.$s#$e#Plus, I don't have a sled.#$e#So, how have you been doing lately?
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_thu: My Dad is in the military, fighting against the Gotoro Empire. That's why he's not here.#$e#He's coming back soon, though.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_thu6: Dad's been back for a while now. I guess I'm finally getting used to it.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_thu6_1: I think my Dad is coming back this spring.#$e#It's been 3 years since I've seen him. This is going to be strange.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_thu_2: One thing that's nice about winter... all the mosquitos are gone.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_tue: Oh, hi! It's good to see you again.#$e#Take it easy.
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_tue4: Hi, @. Do you want to hang out or something?#$e#Well, it's a good time of year to catch up on all the sleep I've missed.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sam.winter_wed: I'm glad I work at the museum now. It's way more interesting than that depressing JojaMart ever was.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.acceptbirthda: Uhh... well, I appreciate the thought.
Oh, really? I wasn't expecting this. It looks great, though. Thank you.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.acceptgift_(o: I really love this. How did you know?$h
You brought me soup? That's really nice of you.$h#$b#This one brings back a lot of memories...
Whoa... This egg speaks to me... I'll put it on my desk. Thanks!$h
Is that obsidian? This is exactly what I've been looking for... I'm gonna see if I can shape it into a dagger.$h
What are you trying to say... I need to work out?$s#$b#Well, I'm more of a 'nimble' guy... Maybe I'll read the first half.$h
Hey, thank you. I'll drink this when the sky gets dark.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.acceptgift_(t: Hey, that's a frog egg! I'll see if I can get it to hatch. Thanks!$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.breakup: ... alright...$s#$b#I guess I'll see you around, then...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.dating_sebast: Don't make fun of me... but I've never been in a relationship like this before.$l
Hey... you look great.$l#$e#I've been thinking about you all day...$l
Hey... It's been a year since we started dating, remember?$h#$e#It's been the best year of my life...$l
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.default: Oh. You just moved in, right? Cool.#$e#Out of all the places you could live, you chose Pelican Town?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.divorced: Why do you keep bothering me? I'm trying to forget about you.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.dumped_guys: I don't want to see you for a while.$u
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_cave1: Not so fast! I want to know what it is.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_cave2: Really? It was making a lot of noise!
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_cave3: It's too dangerous without a sword. But I like your sense of adventure.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_city1: Hmm... Not exactly how I'd put it but, yeah.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_city2: Yea... That's exactly how I feel, too.$l
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_city3: Oh... Well maybe this wasn't the right place to bring you, then. I thought you'd see the beauty in it.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_city4: Ugh... You sound like my Mom.$a#$b#...*sigh*$s#$b#You're right, though. I'm addicted to these things, it's not good.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_game2: Good choice. That works well with my role.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.event_garage3: Don't worry, I'll make sure to show you the ropes before I let you do anything dangerous.$8
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.eventseen_408: The show went well. I was kind of nervous beforehand, but once we went up on stage I just kinda got into the zone.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_20: Are you looking forward to the Spirit's Eve festival? It's probably my favorite.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_26: The Spirit's Eve festival is tomorrow. I really hope they have those skeletons on display again this year.$h#$e#I almost feel like they're my friends at this point.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_fri: *yawn*... I was up until 3 reading this new book...
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_fri6: I've been reading a book about a farmer. Reminds me a lot of you, actually.$h#$e#Sorry if that creeps you out.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_fri_good: Hey, me too. There's nothing like a good fiction to push the boundaries of the imagination.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_mon: So... it's the big harvest season, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_mon4: You're probably making a lot of money on your farm, huh?#$e#I guess I should get a job soon...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_sat: I was *this* close to moping in bed the entire day. Kinda wish I had, now.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_sun: The sun is coming out less and less these days... wonderful.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_thu: My room might be a little less depressing if I had a window...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_tue: Pumpkin spice this... pumpkin spice that... man, I do get sick of these seasonal fads.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_tue10: I've always felt like an underdog. But the challenge will just make me stronger.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_tue6: Who does Demetrius think he is, telling me what to do? He's not even my real father.$a
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_wed: *yawn*... what time is it? I think I slept too much last night.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fall_wed8: I'm glad you showed up. I was starting to get bored.#$e#Now I feel a lot more energetic, believe it or not.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.firstvisit_ra: I'm glad the path to the railroad tracks is open again.#$b#I like going up there when I feel like being alone.#$e#...Which is often.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.flowerdance_a: Oh yeah? ... Alright, I will.#$b#Heh... maybe this festival isn't so bad.$h
Ugh... do we have to? Alright.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.flowerdance_d: No... There's someone else I want to dance with.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fri: Uh... I don't really know you.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fri2: *sigh*... If gas wasn't so expensive I'd ride my motorcycle to the city today.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fri8: What's new?$h#$e#I'll be at the saloon tonight destroying Sam at pool again.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fri_bad: Oh yea? Hmm... Not really my thing, but everyone's different I guess.$u
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fri_good: Oh yeah? Well, did you read the new 'Cave Saga X'? I won't spoil it for you, but oh man...$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.fri_old: You probably prefer the small-town life, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.gift_taste.lo: I really love this. How did you know?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.greenrain: My mom's freaking out, but I'm actually kind of enjoying this. I bet the frogs are going wild out there!$h#$e#I'm gonna stay here to try and keep her calm, though.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.greenrain_2: I was hoping this weather would come back. It makes me appreciate the summer a little more.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.introduction: Oh. You just moved in, right? Cool.#$e#Out of all the places you could live, you chose Pelican Town?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.married_maru: Demetrius has been all wound up because of the wedding, it's been pretty tense around the house.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.mon4: If I just disappeared would it really matter?$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.mountain_47_2: I come here for the peace and quiet.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.sat: What? I didn't hear you... I'm busy thinking about something.#$e#What do you want?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.sat2: You know, I should be doing something productive right now. I just lose focus too fast...$s#$b#Maybe I should drink more coffee?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.spring_12: I'm not too big on festivals. Lots of commotion, too much social interaction... More stress than fun, if you ask me.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.spring_23: Ugh... Tomorrow is the worst festival of the year by a mile. Just wait and see how stupid I look during the flower dance.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_10: Hehe... It might be funny to put something disgusting in the potluck soup tomorrow. Just don't poison anyone.#$e#Why ruin the potluck? Hmm... I guess some people feel liberated when the rigid structures of society break down a little. Maybe I'm weird.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_27: Tomorrow we'll all be gathering at the docks to see the migration of the moonlight jellies. I think it starts at ten o'clock.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_fri6: Hey, I'm glad you stopped by.$h#$e#How have you been coping with this heat?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_mon: Everyone is so happy in the sun. I don't get it.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_mon6: Everyone is so happy when it's sunny out...#$e#Different people like different things, I guess.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_mounta: The temperature only starts to get comfortable at night.#$e#It always seems to stay a little cooler by the lake.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_sat: I hope we're not having mushroom casserole tonight...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_sun: I usually only go outside after dark. Does that sound weird to you?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_sun4: Last night, I saw a group of bats flying around near the lake.#$e#I guess maybe they are feeding on the mosquitoes this time of year?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_thu: I definitely don't want to go swimming, if that's what you're going to ask.$s#$e#Oh, you just stopped to say hi? Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_thu10: If you ever wanted to go swimming... I guess I'd do it.$l
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_tue: I'm looking forward to the cold, damp season. I feel more at home.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_tue4: I'm looking forward to the cold, damp season. Channeling my inner toad, I guess.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_wed: What's the point of going outside? I've already seen it all.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_wed10: Why am I grinning? I guess I've been unusually happy lately...$l
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.summer_wed6: If you're depressed, everything seems stupid. But if you're feeling positive, then even the most mundane things will make you happy.#$e#How do you stay positive long term? I have no idea.#$e#...Maybe I'll figure it out some day.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.sun10: I was just thinking about you...$l
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.sun4: I usually stay inside, but I do go to the beach now and then.#$b#Pretty much only when it's raining, though.#$e#For some reason, staring off into the bleak horizon makes me feel... I dunno. Like it's worthwhile to keep pushing on, I guess.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.thu: I snuck into the caves last night and got a nasty cut from a rock crab. Don't tell anyone, okay?#$e#Hi.#$e#...want something?
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.thu4: Why does everyone like Maru so much? Sure, she's smart and friendly, but don't they realize it's all just an attention-grabbing scam?#$e#Sorry...$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.thu6: Could you picture someone like me living on a farm? It seems ridiculous.$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.thu8: Could you picture me living on a farm?#$e#It seems ridiculous, but I have been thinking about it lately.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.tue: I was thinking... people are like stones skipping over the water.#$b#Eventually we're going to sink.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.tue6: Sam's really outgoing, so when we hang out he does most of the talking.#$b#That's fine with me!
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.wed: What am I going to do today?#$e#Probably nothing.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.wed10: I dunno where I'd be without you... probably in a ditch somewhere.$l
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.wed2: Sam is probably my only friend in this town.#$e#Well, Abby is nice too, but...$h#$e#Umm.. never mind.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.wed2_inlaw_ab: Sam is probably my only friend in this town, anymore...
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.wed6: You and Sam are probably my only friends in this town.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_24: It's the eve of the winter star today. Better make sure you've got an empty stomach for the feast tomorrow.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_fri: It's fun to live so close to the train tracks. It's a reminder that there's a big world out there.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_fri8: When I was younger I'd run out to the railroad whenever I heard a train coming.#$e#Whatever happened to those days...? *sigh*$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_mon: I'm enjoying this gloomy weather... although I have to say, it's a little cold.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_mon4: Nothing surprises me anymore... nothing makes me laugh.#$e#Yeah, I know... I'm being a little dramatic.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_mon8: Do you ever think back on your old self with shame and embarrassment?#$e#I guess it's just part of growing up.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_sat: The frogs aren't very happy in winter.#$e#Poor little guys.$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_sat6: I like winter but I do feel bad for all the cold animals out there.#$e#I guess they're used to it, though... like me.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_sun: I built a snowgoon but Demetrius made me get rid of it.#$e#What's his problem?$u
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_sun6: I built a snowgoon but Demetrius made me get rid of it... yet Maru's cute little snowman goes unharmed!$a#$e#Ridiculous.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_thu: I wonder what's for dinner tonight... *grumble*$s
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_thu6: I should learn how to cook. That would be useful.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_tue: Hmm... I don't really have anything to say. I still don't know you very well.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_tue10: You came here to see me?$l#$e#...$h
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_tue4: Hey...#$b#It's hard to think of new things to talk about, sometimes. Even after you know someone.#$e#...Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_tue6: I was so close to screaming at Mom for throwing away my old comic collection... But something stopped me.#$e#Hmm... with age comes wisdom.
stardewcraft.npc.sebastian.winter_wed4: Hey, don't let me stop you from getting your work done.#$e#If you aren't busy I don't mind if you stick around.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.acceptbirthdaygif: Oh, is it my birthday? That's right... I almost forgot. Thanks.
Oh, is it my birthday? I was hoping I'd forget.#$b#This is actually really nice, though. Thank you.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.acceptgift_(o)203: Oh, you made it? *squish*... Um... *smack*... I think I'll stick to frozen pizza. But thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.acceptgift_(o)sta: Heh... thanks. Tastes just like beer.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.breakup: *gulp* Oh... Yeah, okay... I guess I should've seen this coming.$s#$b#I'll... uh... guess I'll see you at the Saloon.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.dating_shane: I... wasn't really expecting this, after all I've put you through...
stardewcraft.npc.shane.dating_shane_memo: I think I might be the luckiest guy in the world... $h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.default: ...I don't feel like talking to anyone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.dumped_guys: %Shane has a glazed look in his eye. He won't speak to you.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_apologize2: I know... that's why I stopped by, to tell you about it.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_apologize3: Wow, it was that serious, huh? I can hardly remember...
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_noloan1: I didn't know you were such a miser...$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_room1: Okay... that'll require a great script. Maybe I'll ask Elliott for advice next time I see him at the saloon.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_room2: Sounds great. I'll have to create a bunch of practical effects to make it look cool.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_stadium1: Oh yeah? I guess that makes sense.$6#$b#Me? I get bored with Pelican Town sometimes.#$b#But... I like that you're different. We balance each other out.$l
stardewcraft.npc.shane.event_stadium2: Oh really? I'm surprised... Didn't you move to Stardew Valley to escape the noise of the city?$6#$b#I mean... Don't get me wrong, I totally understand. My life in Pelican Town is pretty bland, you know.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.eventseen_3910975: Sorry you had to see me like that, @...$s
I'm trying to cut back on the drinks... it's not going to be easy.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.eventseen_611944_: Have you tried the new Joja Bubblerito? I ate two in one sitting yesterday, that was a mistake...
stardewcraft.npc.shane.fri: Don't you have work to do?
stardewcraft.npc.shane.fri10: My body hurts a lot less since I cut back on the booze.#$e#But it still feels like I'm always teetering on the edge...$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.fri4: $d Joja#What's the point of life if all you do is work?|I haven't been able to pay my rent, but Marnie's letting me stay anyway. I'm lucky.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.fri6: I'll definitely be going to the saloon tonight. What else is there to do?
stardewcraft.npc.shane.fri8: Buh... Can you imagine how disgusting my liver must look?$s#$e#My body feels twenty years older than it should...$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.gift_taste.hated: Why are you giving me your garbage?
stardewcraft.npc.shane.gift_taste.loved: Oh wow, @! How'd you know this is my favorite?
stardewcraft.npc.shane.gift_taste.neutra: Oh, you got me something? Thanks!
stardewcraft.npc.shane.greenrain: I don't have to go into work today, so I'm not complaining...
stardewcraft.npc.shane.greenrain_2: Oh, there's some kind of weird weather today? I didn't notice.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.jojamart: %Shane's hard at work. He doesn't seem interested in talking.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.mon: I don't know you. Why are you talking to me?
stardewcraft.npc.shane.mon10: Do you ever feel like the whole world is scrutinizing you like some disgusting insect?
stardewcraft.npc.shane.mon2: I hardly know you. Why are you talking to me?||What's the point of talking to me? I don't want any friends.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.mon4: Hey. Sorry if I came off as rude when we first met.#$e#It takes me a while to warm up to strangers.||It's a lot of effort to be friends with someone. It's easier to just be alone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.mon6: I'll be honest, I still can't understand why you'd want to be friends with me.||Life isn't fair, and I can't help but feel bitter about it.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.pamhouseupgrade: I heard you built Pam a house... That's really generous...#$b#You know, I could use a hundred thousand gold myself...#$e#*ahem* ...ah ...Just kidding. ...Heh.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.pamhouseupgradean: I heard someone bought Pam a house... *sigh*... What did Pam ever do to earn that kind of generosity??
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat: Why are you bothering me? I want to be alone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat10: Your farm seems like a great place to raise chickens.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat2: #$1 ShaneJOSH#I'm surprised that you're still trying to make friends with me. Haven't I been rude enough to you yet?#$e#*sigh*...$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat4: $d Joja#I'm renting my room from Marnie at a really good price. It's small but I can't complain.|If I could reset my life maybe I'd start a chicken farm. Only free-range eggs of course.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat8: I've really grown attached to Marnie's chickens.$h||A chicken will never let you down. Humans, on the other hand...
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun: I'm busy, can't you tell?||...I don't feel like talking to anyone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun10: Hi, @. I've actually been having a pretty good day so far.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun2: You again? How many times do I have to tell you to leave me alone?$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun4: Hmm... it's %time. Should I throw a frozen pizza in the microwave, or should I wait?$u||If the Tunnelers win, I'll knock back a cold one to celebrate.#$e#If they lose? I'll have a cold one to drown my sorrows.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun6: ...I think I might be gaining weight.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun8: If I watch more TV maybe I can forget about life. That would be relaxing.$u
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu: What do you want? Leave me alone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu4: You're really persistent. I guess I'm just surprised that anyone would be interested in talking to me.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu6: Buh... Where's the Joja Cola?||Why try? Life's just a roll of the dice.#$e#When they rolled mine, the dice fell off the table.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu8: You like talking to me? I guess I believe you... maybe you're as weird as I am.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue: What? What do you want? Go away.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue10: I need to keep it together for Jas' sake. I don't want to be a bad role model for her.||I'm kind of like a father figure to Jas. I just hope I haven't let her down too much.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue2: What do you want from me? Money? I'd give you a pot of gold to leave me alone!
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue4: Every time I try something new it goes horribly wrong. You learn to just stay in a shell.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue6: Life isn't so bad... at least I have frozen pizza and eggs.$u
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue8: We should go to a Tunnelers game some time. When I go by myself, I usually drink way too much beer.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.wed: No, I don't have time to chat with you.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.wed4: $d Joja#*sigh* ...Every day is the same. Stocking those horrible shelves, going to the saloon, tossing and turning all night.$s|I hated my job at JojaMart, but now that I'm unemployed I feel even worse.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.wed8: I guess I've grown attached to Marnie and Jas. We're a ragtag bunch but it kind of feels like a weird family.#$e#I never really had much of a family as a kid.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.acceptbirthdayg: A birthday present? Oh... this isn't very fun.$s
Is that a birthday present? Can I open it now?#$b#Oh, wow! This is exactly what I wanted! Yayayaya!$h
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.acceptgift_(tr): *Squish* *squish* ... Ewww! Can I have it? Can I have it? Yaaay!$h
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.default: Oh, a stranger! My name's Vincent.
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.fri: #$c .3#Ew, it's boiled beet night again...$s#$e#Oh no... Mom's making lentil soup tonight.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.gift_taste.love: Wow, thank you so much! This is terrific!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.greenrain: Mom! I wanna go outside and play!%noturn
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.introduction: Oh, a stranger! My name's Vincent.#$b#Momma says not to talk to strangers... But you seem okay.
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.mon: I wanna be just like my big brother when I grow up!$h#$e#Okay! Bye!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.mon4: $d kent#I'm glad Dad's back... but he's different than I remember...$s|Dad's not around much... I miss playing with him.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.sat: Miss Penny makes me read a new book every week.$s#$b#At least she lets me pick them, sometimes!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.sat8: $d kent#Dad seems weird since he came back. I wonder what happened to him?$s#$b#He doesn't play with me anymore.$s|I wonder if Dad will ever come home...$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.sun10: Hi Uncle @!^Hi Auntie @!#$e#Don't tell Mom... but you're my favorite grown-up.$h
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.thu2: You're not as boring as most grown-ups!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.tue: *sigh*... Mom won't let me have any more gummies today.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.tue6: Can you keep a secret, mister?^Can you keep a secret, miss?$u#$b#I wanna marry Miss Penny when I grow up.#$e#Just don't tell her, okay?$u
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.wed: I wanna look for bugs, but Mom gets mad when I'm all dirty.$u#$b#It's a tough choice.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.acceptgift_(o)336: *chomp*... Yep, that's real gold alright. Heh! What a gift!$h
stardewcraft.npc.willy.acceptgift_(o)682: The horror! ...What kind of monster is this?
stardewcraft.npc.willy.acceptgift_(o)sta: By the stem o' me pipe...  a cup o' Stardrop Tea! And here I thought it was only the stuff of mermaid legend. Thank you kindly.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.default: Ahoy there! It's nice to see young folk movin' in to the valley.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_159: So, you finally conquered the Crimsonfish! That fish has been taunting me for many years. He nearly nibbled through the wood under me house!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_160: Ah, you caught the Angler, did ya? A good 'first step' into the world o' rare fish, that one.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_163: By the stem o' me pipe... You actually caught 'the Legend'. I never thought I'd see the day...$h#$b#Well, you've done it... You're the best angler this valley's seen in a long time...$h
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_682: *sniff* *sniff*... Something tells me you've been fishin' in the sewers.#$b#It's an unconventional approach, to be sure. There's legend of gargantuan carp, twisted into monsters from the toxic sludge...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_775: Ah, so you finally snagged the Glacierfish... That's one of the slipperiest fish I've ever encountered!#$e#How many tries did it take ya?
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fri: If you really want to get the fish biting, make sure you put some bait on your hook.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fri4: I'm a simple man... when my pipe is full, I'm happy. When my pipe is empty... well, then I just fill 'er up again.$u
stardewcraft.npc.willy.gift_taste.dislik: Hmmm... You like stuff like this? Huh.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.gift_taste.hated: ... *sniff*... Well I guess I can toss it into the chum bucket.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.gift_taste.loved: This is great! If only me ol' Pappy was around. He'd go nuts for this.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.greenrain: Aye... I hope these weird rains don't bother the fish... It could ruin me life!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.greenrain_2: If the fish like these rains, then I like 'em, too.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.greenrainfinished: Well, the fish seem as healthy as ever. In fact, I swear they've been biting with extra vigor!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.introduction: Ahoy there! It's nice to see young folk movin' in to the valley. It's not very common these days.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.married: Giving up the single life, eh?#$b#Just don't forget to make time for fishing...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.mon: Ahoy there!#$b#Looks like decent weather for fishing, eh?
stardewcraft.npc.willy.mon4: Have you had much luck in the local waters? You look like you could be a strong angler if you set your mind to it.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sat: If the local fishing scene got a bit more lively, I might expand the shop's stock.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sat8: How's the fishing life going for ya?#$e#I try to fish as often as possible, but it's not easy when you've got a shop to run.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.summer_19: Tomorrow is the annual Trout Derby... Aye, it's a freshwater enthusiast's dream!#$e#Anglers from all over the world will be here to catch our beautiful Rainbow Trout...#$e#I hope to see you out there!$h#$e#For the next two days, I'll only be manning the shop for one hour, starting at 9am. So if you really need somethin', you can come by then.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.summer_20: It's the big day! I've got all me equipment tuned to catch Trout...#$e#Good luck out there!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.summer_21: How's the Derby treatin' ya so far?#$b#I've found plenty o' Golden Tags, meself... but it's not over yet!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sun: If you purchase a high quality fishing rod, you'll be able to attach bait and tackle to the line.#$b#Bait causes fish to bite faster. Tackle can make your job a lot easier when reeling fish in.#$e#There's all kinds of tackle, with different perks. They're usually a little flimsy, so don't be surprised if your tackle breaks after a while.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sun10: Hey, it's my skipper, @!$h#$e#I'd give you a discount on bait if I could afford it.$s
stardewcraft.npc.willy.thu: *mumble* *mumble* ...Eh? I would tell you about my thoughts, but it's a fisherman's secret.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.thu2: There's rumors of some very rare fish in these parts... but only an experienced angler could stand a chance against them.#$e#You'll need the finest bait you can get if you want a rare fish to bite.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.tue: A true angler has respect for the water... don't you forget that.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.tue6: The ol' Man was a fisherman, you know. I grew up sailing between the fern islands, living from catch to catch.#$e#The fishing life is tough, but there's something about it that keeps you goin'.
