stardewcraft.npc.willy.wed: Some fish come and go with the seasons. Others only come out at night or in the rain.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.wed6: I've heard a rumor that a special kind of fish can be found in the pools between waterfalls...#$b#If you can reach it with yer rod, that is...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.winter_11: Tomorrow, at the beach, is the start of a little gathering... called 'SquidFest'.#$e#Aye... tis' a difficult catch, the squid. But I trust that you've developed a knack for the sport, by now.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.winter_12: Don't give up just yet! There's more squid in these waters...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.winter_13: It warms me ol' winter heart to see all these anglers gathered here, all for the love o' fishing...$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.accepted: Good. An Eye of Ender... you should know how to obtain one. Come back when you have it.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.daily_hub: Where would you like to go?$q wizard_daily wizard_go_stardew#$r wizard_go_stardew 0 wizard_go_stardew#Take me to Pelican Town#$r wizard_go_overworld 0 wizard_go_overworld#I want to go back#$r wizard_stay 0 wizard_stay#Nothing, just visiting
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.daily_locked: The Eye of Ender... have you found it? Without it, the portal cannot be stabilized.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.daily_unlocked: Hello, farmer. If you need anything, just ask.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.default: There are many mysteries around us. You must be patient if you wish to discover them.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_cage: You've seen one before, haven't you?#$b#They call themselves the 'Junimos'...#$b#Mysterious spirits, these ones... For some reason, they refuse to speak with me.$q wizard_e112_cage_end wizard_e112_dismiss#$r wizard_e112_dismiss 0 wizard_e112_dismiss#Go on...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_cauldron: Come here!$h#$b#My cauldron is bubbling with ingredients from the forest.$h#$b#Baby fern, moss grub, caramel-top toadstool... Can you smell it?$h#$b#Here. Drink up. Let the essence of the forest permeate your body.$h$q wizard_e112_drink_q wizard_e112_drink#$r wizard_e112_drink 0 wizard_e112_drink#Drink the potion
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_complete: You've gained the power of forest magic! Now you can decipher the true meaning of the Junimo scrolls.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_intro: Ah... Come in.#$b#I am Rasmodius... Seeker of the arcane truths.#$b#Mediary between physical and ethereal.#$b#Master of the seven elementals.#$b#Keeper of the sacred cha-... you get the point.#$b#And you... @. The one whose arrival I have long foreseen.#$b#Here, I'd like to show you something.$q wizard_e112_show wizard_e112_reveal#$r wizard_e112_reveal 0 wizard_e112_reveal#Alright, show me.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_note: I'm not sure why they've moved into the community center, but you have no reason to fear them.#$b#Hmmm? You found a golden scroll written in an unknown language?#$b#Most interesting...#$b#Stay here. I'm going to see for myself. I'll return shortly.$q wizard_e112_leave_q wizard_e112_wizard_leave#$r wizard_e112_wizard_leave 0 wizard_e112_wizard_leave#...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_return: I found the note...#$b#The language is obscure, but I was able to decipher it:#$b#"We, the Junimo, are happy to aid you. In return, we ask for gifts of the valley. If you are one with the forest then you will see the true nature of this scroll."#$b#Hmm... 'One with the forest'... What do they mean?#$b#...*sniff*...*sniff*...#$b#Ah-hah!$h$q wizard_e112_aha wizard_e112_cauldron#$r wizard_e112_cauldron 0 wizard_e112_cauldron#What is it?
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.fri: I believe the townsfolk are afraid of me.#$e#It is unfortunate, but I suppose it is human to be afraid of the unknown.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.fri6: I was married, long ago. After my wife and I split, she began flying around the countryside, cursing everything she saw.#$e#It's not a very mature way to express one's anger.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.galaxy_granted: It is done.$h#$b#Behold — the Galaxy Sword! Its prismatic energy has been bound to the blade.#$b#You will find no weapon more powerful in all the valley.#$b#I've also informed Marlon at the Adventurer's Guild. If you ever need similar weapons, he can now provide them.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.galaxy_offer: Wait... that crystal in your hand...$h#$b#That is a Prismatic Shard! I can feel its immense power radiating outward.#$b#I have studied these crystals for decades. With the right incantation, I can channel its energy into a weapon of unparalleled strength...$h#$b#If you give me this shard, I will forge for you a Galaxy Sword — the most powerful blade in existence.$q wizard_galaxy wizard_galaxy_confirm#$r wizard_galaxy_confirm 0 wizard_galaxy_confirm#Yes, please forge the Galaxy Sword!#$r wizard_galaxy_decline 0 wizard_galaxy_decline#Not right now.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.disli: This?... I suppose I'll cast it into the flames and see what happens.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.hated: Ughh... These are utterly mundane. Please refrain from bothering me with this in the future.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.liked: Many thanks. This item has some very interesting properties.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.loved: Ahh, this is imbued with potent arcane energies. It's very useful for my studies. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.neutr: Thank you. This will prove useful, I think.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.greenrain: Though the unusual rains may be alarming, there is nothing to fear on this day.#$e#In fact, it is a day of great joy for many living things.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.greenrain_2: Nature is a powerful force, not to be trifled with.#$e#Excuse me, but there are special matters I can only attend to on this day.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.has_eye: Ah, you brought an Eye of Ender! Let me see...$h#Yes, the void energy is quite potent. The portal should stabilize soon.#From this point on, you may travel freely between the two worlds.$h#Now let me send you to your farm. To come back, just use the magic circle in my tower.$q wizard_first_tp wizard_first_teleport#$r wizard_first_teleport 0 wizard_first_teleport#Alright!
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.intro_1: Hmm... there's a peculiar aura about you. Let me see... You're not originally from this world.$s#$b#Your grandfather — yes, I knew him. He once crossed dimensions to reach Pelican Town, where he owned a farm.$h#$b#Before he left, he passed the inheritance of that farm to his descendants. And you... you are that heir.#$b#I am Rasmodius, a wizard. I travel between dimensions, studying the mysteries of nature and magic.#$b#I can open a portal to Pelican Town, but dimensional travel requires a special catalyst...$q wizard_intro_ask wizard_accepted#Bring me an Eye of Ender. The void energy within it is exactly what I need to stabilize the dimensional rift. Will you help?#$r wizard_accepted 0 wizard_accepted#Sure, I'll find one!#$r wizard_decline 0 null#Let me think about it
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.introduction: Ah, yes. I have predicted your arrival a long time ago, young @.#$e#However, your fate is ultimately in your own hands.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.junimo_potion: Ah... you're the one who found the Junimo scrolls in the Community Center.$s#$b#Those little creatures... Junimos... are forest spirits. They write in an ancient magical language.#$b#Fortunately, I happen to have something that can help you.$h#$b#Drink this Forest Magic potion. It will attune your mind to the forces of nature.#$b#[You drink the potion with green bubbles... For a moment, the whole world seems clearer.]#$b#Good... Now you should be able to read their writing. Go back to the Community Center and take a look.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.married: Marriage... hmm? I pray that you have better luck than I did...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.mon: Ah, yes. I have seen many things about your future, young @.#$e#If I were to tell you, there could be grave consequences.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.mon4: Outside the domain of human civilization is where nature truly reveals its secrets.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.mon8: There are areas of the world, yet unsullied by the constraints of modern thinking, where magic is still very much alive...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sat: Beware, you are standing above a potent magical field.#$e#I built my hut right here on purpose, you know.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sat2: Have you made any headway with the forest spirits?
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sat6: While the scientific practice may accurately describe the material of our world, it will never explain the deepest mysteries...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sun: I sometimes observe the local villagers in secret.#$e#I am hoping to find an apprentice. Some day I will leave this mortal plane, but my arcane pursuits must continue.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.thu: There are many mysteries around us. You must be patient if you wish to discover them.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.thu10: You mustn't tell anyone... but I have reason to believe that one of the locals is actually my daughter...#$e#I could be mistaken... It's rare, but it does happen.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue: If you have nothing important to tell me, leave me be. I have much work to do.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue10: If reality is constructed by the mind, then if one were to master the power of mind, they could control reality...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue4: I trust you enough to allow you in my basement. Treat what you find there with respect.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue8: Greetings, @. I trust you haven't been dabbling in the dark arts?
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.wed: It takes years of study to understand the language of the elementals.#$e#To actually speak their language requires a lifetime of devoted effort.#$e#Now, if you'll excuse me...
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.gift_taste.hated: Sorry, but I really don't like this...
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.gift_taste.loved: How did you know I love these? You're the sweetest!
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.default: Hello hello, sweetie!$h What can I help you with?
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.mon: Hello hello, sweetie!$h What can I help you with?
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.tue: What did I used to do? I actually worked in the same hair salon as Emily's mom.$h#$b#We were stylists back then. Emily and I used to play together!
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.wed: I'm always meeting new people here at the Oasis. I sure love having visitors!$h
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.thu: I brought a bunch of decorations and things from the city to make this place feel homey.$h#$e#What do you think? Pretty nice, eh?
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.fri: You know, the desert isn't so bad once you get used to it.$h#$b#It's quiet and peaceful out here... I like it.
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.sat: Hello sweetie! How's it going? Find anything good in the desert?$h
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.sun: Have you tried my Coconut? The ones here are the freshest you'll ever taste!$h
stardewcraft.passout.reason.mine: You were knocked out in the mines.
stardewcraft.portal.quarry.blocked: A mysterious force blocks your way...
stardewcraft.profession.acrobat.desc: Cooldown on special moves cut in half.
stardewcraft.profession.artisan.desc: Artisan goods (wine, cheese, oil, etc.) worth 40%% more.
stardewcraft.profession.botanist.desc: Foraged items are always highest quality.
stardewcraft.profession.coopmaster.desc: Befriend coop animals quicker. Incubation time cut in half.
stardewcraft.profession.gatherer.desc: Chance for double harvest of foraged items.
stardewcraft.profession.geologist.desc: Chance for gems to appear in pairs.
stardewcraft.profession.lumberjack.desc: All trees have a chance to drop hardwood.
stardewcraft.profession.luremaster.desc: Crab pots no longer require bait.
stardewcraft.profession.mariner.desc: Crab pots no longer produce junk items.
stardewcraft.profession.shepherd.desc: Befriend barn animals quicker. Sheep produce wool faster.
stardewcraft.profession.trapper.desc: Resources required to craft crab pots reduced.

stardewcraft.tv.cooking.already_known: You already know how to cook %s.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.1: Stir Fry! It's a perfect way to get some healthy greens on your plate.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.10: Trout Soup! There's something about fresh-caught trout that just gets me buzzing.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.11: Glazed Yams! What better way to enjoy these delightful tubers than by slathering them in a sweet, sticky glaze?
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.12: Artichoke Dip! This is a delightful way to get more artichokes into your body.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.13: Plum Pudding! Little Jack Horner is champing at the bit for this ooey-gooey delight.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.14: Chocolate Cake! What better way to spend these cold winter nights?
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.15: Pumpkin Pie! The season just isn't complete without that wonderful flavor.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.16: Cranberry Candy! Here's a fun one to help you celebrate the new year.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.17: Pizza! There's a reason pizza is a timeless culinary classic.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.18: Hashbrowns! This one's simple, but that's a good thing!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.19: Complete Breakfast! This meal will really fill you up.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.2: Coleslaw! A great coleslaw can be so much more.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.20: Lucky Lunch! An old legend has it that this meal is irresistible to spirits of luck and fortune.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.21: Carp Surprise! Ever have a bunch of carp laying around and no idea what to do with them?
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.22: Maple Bars! You can really taste the forest in these bars.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.23: Pink Cake! You'll never guess the secret ingredient... melon!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.24: Roasted Hazelnuts! That rich, nutty smell is irresistible.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.25: Fruit Salad! Here's a healthy and delicious treat to brighten up your day.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.26: Blackberry Cobbler! This one always reminds me of Stardew Valley.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.27: Crab Cakes! Crab meat is very flimsy on its own, but these cakes are my favorite way to eat crab!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.28: Fiddlehead Risotto! It's not very easy to make a good one. But with my help, you'll have the best chance.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.29: Poppyseed Muffin! They add a nice flavor and a great texture to bready desserts.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.3: Radish Salad! There's nothing like a fresh, peppery radish.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.30: Lobster Bisque! You could serve this one to the governor himself.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.31: Bruschetta! It's a wonderfully simple appetizer.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.32: Shrimp Cocktail! Here's another good appetizer for you and your dinner guests.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.4: Omelet! A perfect omelet is a thing of beauty.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.5: Baked Fish! Just make sure the fish is fresh, preferably caught with your own rod!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.6: Pancakes! There's something comforting about a simple pancake.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.7: Maki Roll! The delicate flavor of the ocean, sealed within a pillowy cloud of rice.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.8: Bread! Breadmaking can be a very complex form of art, but I'll make it simple for you.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.9: Tortillas! Once you've tried my fresh, rustic corn tortillas you'll never go back...
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.not_ready: Just kidding... I'm not ready. I don't have anything for you today.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.null_error: Um... that's odd. My information sheet just says 'null'. This is embarrassing...
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.opening: Greetings! It is I, the queen of sauce... here to teach you a new mouth-watering recipe from my secret cookbook. This week's dish...
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.bad_1: The spirits are somewhat annoyed today. Luck will not be on your side.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.bad_2: The spirits are very displeased today. They will do their best to make your life difficult.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.best: The spirits are very happy today! They will do their best to shower everyone with good fortune.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.good_1: The spirits are in good humor today. I think you'll have a little extra luck.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.good_2: The spirits are joyous! Someone gave them a nice offering today, and they are very pleased.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.neutral_1: The spirits are somewhat mildly perturbed today. Luck will not be on your side.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.neutral_2: The spirits feel neutral today. The day is in your hands.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.neutral_3: This is rare. The spirits feel absolutely neutral today.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_0: Ah... I sense that a new viewer has joined us. A young man from... Stardew Valley? Welcome, welcome!
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_1: Ah... yes, I can hear the spirits whispering something to me...
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_2: Welcome back to 'Welwick's Oracle'... If you seek hidden knowledge of the future, well you've come to the right place.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_3: Hoo.. I see a glimmer within my scrying orb... A shard of knowledge from the future!
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_4: Welcome to Welwick's Oracle... the ONLY show where the voice of the spirits is channeled directly... to YOU.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.worst: The spirits are furious. Apparently someone tried to give them a worthless offering... Hmm. It's unwise to play jokes on the spirits!
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.zero: This is rare. The spirits feel absolutely nothing today.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.1: This one's for all you greenhorns out there: chop wood and search for wild forage to earn some cash while waiting on your first harvest!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.102: If you really want to make someone happy, give them their favorite gift on their birthday!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.106: Ever see three little brown stems poking up out of the ground? Dig on that spot and you'll always find something.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.109: Ever had the urge to dig around in your neighbor's trash? Don't do it when anyone's around.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.11: Woes from crows? Sounds like you need a scarecrow! One more thing... need a bigger backpack? Check your local general store.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.113: A new year has arrived. Keep your eyes peeled for any new kinds of seeds.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.116: Fish Focus: Eel. Eels can be caught from the ocean in spring and fall, during rainy evenings.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.120: Got a kitchen? Cooking is a great way to enhance your abilities.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.123: Item Spotlight: Crab Pot. Place it in water and load with bait. Come back the next day to see what you caught.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.127: It's salmonberry season! Harvesting them is a great way to earn some extra cash.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.130: Let's talk honey. If you've got flowers blooming near your beehouse, your bees can produce flavored honey.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.134: Don't forget your weapon's special attack! Swords block, clubs pound the ground, daggers do a triple-strike!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.137: The Adventurer's Guild has a rewards program for slaying monsters in the local caves.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.141: I've heard that some folks stand near moving trains to gather any debris that falls off.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.144: Animal Spotlight: Pig. Pigs are trained to sniff out valuable truffles.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.148: A reminder of the fish you can only find in summer: Dorado, Rainbow Trout, Pufferfish, and Octopus.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.15: It's salmonberry season! Harvesting them is a great way to earn some extra cash.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.151: Fish Focus: Super Cucumber. Found in the ocean during summer and fall evenings.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.155: Stop worrying about your horse! They'll make their way back home.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.158: Here's an idea... start a wild tree orchard! Put tappers on those trees.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.162: Item Spotlight: Keg. You can make wine out of any fruit. You can also make juice out of veggies.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.165: Do you have a journal? Don't forget to check it from time to time.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.169: If you managed to get a 'rare seed', now's the time to plant it.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.172: Some farmers have reported strange things happening when large fields of cauliflower, melon, or pumpkin reach maturity.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.176: It's blackberry season! Bushes across the countryside are overflowing with ripe fruit.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.179: Looking to get married? You're going to need a Mermaid's Pendant.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.18: Ah, refreshing rain... a Farmer's best friend! When it rains, you don't have to water your crops.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.183: Item Spotlight: Recycling Machine. Turn trash items into something useful.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.186: Fish Focus: Albacore. Found in the ocean in fall or winter, early morning or at night.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.190: Fish Focus: Woodskip, sandfish, and scorpion carp.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.193: It's just a couple days until Spirit's Eve! Search for the golden pumpkin in the haunted maze.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.197: You're going to need a nursery in your house before you can have kids.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.200: Item Spotlight: Crystalarium. This machine can create infinite copies of any gemstone.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.204: If you have adult barn animals and space left... there's always a chance one could give birth.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.207: Fish Focus: Catfish. This rare fish comes out when it rains. Don't bother fishing for them in summer!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.211: Item Spotlight: Worm Bin. Need an endless supply of bait? Build yourself a worm bin.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.214: Don't be surprised when spring rolls around and your farm needs some tidying up!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.218: If you've got a gold pan, keep an eye out for something sparkly in the water.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.22: Get your hands on a fishin' pole and sell your catch! Fishing is a great way to make a little extra cash.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.221: This is the last new episode of Livin' Off The Land before my retirement. Take care!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.25: Fruit trees. They take an entire season to grow, so plan ahead!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.29: Summer's here, along with a whole slew of new crops to plant!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.32: Here's a rundown of the fish you can only find in summer.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.36: Let's talk corn. It's an unusual crop because it lasts for two seasons!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.39: An unusual amount of shells and corals are expected to wash up on beaches.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.4: Check for spring onion southwest of town, where the river meets the ocean.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.43: Got a spa in your town? Relax and hold still in the steaming hot water to replenish your energy.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.46: Summer's known for its lightning storms. If you know how to craft a lightning rod, you can harvest the electricity.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.50: Most towns have a seasonal calendar in front of the general store. Check it now and then.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.53: Fall's almost here! Make sure you're saving some money to buy new seeds.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.57: Let's talk sunflowers. When you harvest them you'll get seeds as well.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.60: A grange display consists of 9 items that best showcase your talents.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.64: It's blackberry season! Bushes across the countryside are overflowing with ripe fruit.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.67: Fish Focus: Salmon. Salmon return to their spawning ground in fall.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.71: Got any tappers? Maple trees yield maple syrup, oak trees provide resin, and pine trees produce pine tar.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.74: Winter's almost here. Make sure you're prepared to feed your animals hay.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.78: Fish Focus: Walleye. Found on rainy evenings during the fall and winter.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.8: Let's talk fences. Fences are useful for keeping weeds at bay and protecting your crops.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.81: Winter's coming soon... and that means your farming operations will be coming to a halt.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.85: Winter... A time when all the world goes quiet. Now's a great time to do some mining, fishing and gathering.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.88: Wondering how to get 'Refined Quartz'? Just put a regular old quartz in the furnace.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.92: Find any tree seeds while chopping wood? You can plant those in the ground.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.95: There's a couple fish you can only find in winter... Squid and Lingcod.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.99: Let's talk geodes. Geodes are hollow stones that often contain valuable minerals.
stardewcraft.tv.tips.opening: Welcome to "Livin' Off The Land". We're back again with another tip for y'all. Now listen up:
stardewcraft.tv.weather.opening: Welcome to KOZU 5... your number one source for weather, news, and entertainment. And now, the weather forecast for tomorrow...
stardewcraft.tv.weather.rain: It's going to rain all day tomorrow.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.snow_1: Bundle up, folks. It's going to snow tomorrow!
stardewcraft.tv.weather.snow_2: Expect a few inches of snow tomorrow.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.storm: Looks like a storm is approaching. Thunder and lightning is expected.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.sun_1: It's going to be a beautiful, sunny day tomorrow!
stardewcraft.tv.weather.sun_2: It's going to be clear and sunny all day.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.wind_fall: It's going to be cloudy, with gusts of wind throughout the day.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.wind_spring: Partially cloudy with a light breeze. Expect lots of pollen!

stardewcraft.weapon.rusty_sword.lore: "A rusty old sword, but in the darkness of the mines, it's still your most reliable companion."

event.wizard_intro.line1: Hmm... there's a peculiar aura about you. Let me see... You're not originally from this world.$s#$b#Your grandfather — yes, I knew him. He once crossed dimensions to reach Pelican Town, where he owned a farm.$h#$b#Before he left, he passed the inheritance of that farm to his descendants. And you... you are that heir.
event.wizard_intro.line2: I am Rasmodius, a wizard. I travel between dimensions, studying the mysteries of nature and magic.#$b#I can open a portal to Pelican Town, but dimensional travel requires a special catalyst...
event.wizard_intro.line3: Bring me an Eye of Ender. The void energy within can stabilize the dimensional rift.$h
event.wizard_e112.intro: Ah... Come in.#$b#I am Rasmodius... Seeker of the arcane truths.#$b#Mediary between physical and ethereal.#$b#Master of the seven elementals.#$b#Keeper of the sacred cha-... you get the point.#$b#And you... @. The one whose arrival I have long foreseen.#$b#Here, I'd like to show you something.
event.wizard_e112.cage: You've seen one before, haven't you?#$b#They call themselves the 'Junimos'...#$b#Mysterious spirits, these ones... For some reason, they refuse to speak with me.
event.wizard_e112.note: I'm not sure why they've moved into the community center, but you have no reason to fear them.#$b#Hmmm? You found a golden scroll written in an unknown language?#$b#Most interesting...#$b#Stay here. I'm going to see for myself. I'll return shortly.
event.wizard_e112.return_text: I found the note...#$b#The language is obscure, but I was able to decipher it:#$b#"We, the Junimo, are happy to aid you. In return, we ask for gifts of the valley. If you are one with the forest then you will see the true nature of this scroll."#$b#Hmm... 'One with the forest'... What do they mean?#$b#...*sniff*...*sniff*...#$b#Ah-hah!$h
event.wizard_e112.cauldron: Come here!$h#$b#My cauldron is bubbling with ingredients from the forest.$h#$b#Baby fern, moss grub, caramel-top toadstool... Can you smell it?$h#$b#Here. Drink up. Let the essence of the forest permeate your body.$h
event.wizard_e112.complete: You've gained the power of forest magic! Now you can decipher the true meaning of the Junimo scrolls.
event.willy_fishing_rod.greet: Ahoy there!$h#$b#You must be the new farmer. I'm Willy, the fisherman of Pelican Town.#$b#The ocean is a mighty thing... full of life, full of mystery.$h
event.willy_fishing_rod.sea_story: I've spent half my life on this here dock, and the sea still surprises me...$s#$b#It's been a while since I've seen a new face around here.#$b#Say... you know what? I've got something for you.
event.willy_fishing_rod.give_rod: This is my old bamboo pole...$h It's been collecting dust in my shop for years.#$b#Here, take it. It's yours now.$h#$b#I want you to have it. Consider it a 'Welcome to Stardew Valley' present!$h
event.willy_fishing_rod.fish_advice: You can fish just about anywhere there's water.#$b#Rivers, lakes, the ocean... Each spot's got its own catch.#$b#Just cast your line and be patient... You'll get the hang of it.
event.willy_fishing_rod.shop_invite: If you ever need bait or tackle, come visit my shop.$h#$b#It's the little shack right next to us, on the beach.#$b#Good luck out there, friend!$h
event.marlon_mine_intro.old_mine: ...I was just peering down into this old mine shaft.#$b#It's been abandoned for decades.
event.marlon_mine_intro.danger: Still, there's probably good ore down there.#$b#But a dark place, undisturbed for so long... I'm afraid ore isn't the only thing you'll find...
event.marlon_mine_intro.take_this: Here, take this. You might need it.
event.marlon_mine_intro.guild: Name's Marlon, by the way. I run the adventurer's guild right outside.#$b#I'll keep my eye on you. Prove yourself and I might think about making you a member.
event.lewis_cc_tour.this_is_cc: This is the Pelican Town Community Center... or what's left of it, anyway.$s
event.lewis_cc_tour.pride_and_joy: It used to be the pride and joy of the town... always bustling with activity.
event.lewis_cc_tour.shameful: Now... just look at it. It's shameful.$s#$b#These days, the young folk would rather sit in front of the TV than engage with the community.
event.lewis_cc_tour.old_fool: But listen to me, I sound like an old fool.$s
event.lewis_cc_tour.joja: Joja Corporation has been hounding me to sell them the land so they can turn it into a warehouse... #$b#Pelican Town could use the money, but there's something stopping me from selling it... I guess old timers like me get attached to relics of the past... Ah well.$s#$b#If anyone else buys a Joja Co. Membership I'm just gonna go ahead and sell it.
event.lewis_cc_tour.whats_this: Hmm? What's this?...#$b#I guess Vincent and Jas must've been playing in here.
event.lewis_cc_tour.dilapidated: This place is even more dilapidated than I remember.
event.lewis_cc_tour.are_you_ill: What's the matter? Are you ill?$s
event.lewis_cc_tour.rats: You saw something? Hmm... I wouldn't be surprised if this place was full of rats.$h
event.lewis_cc_tour.head_home: Look, I think I'm going to head home. I need some lunch.
event.lewis_cc_tour.unlocked: Hey. I'll keep this place unlocked from now on... maybe you can help catch that rat if you have some extra time.
event.lewis_cc_tour.come_back: I'll have to come back and explore this building further.
event.clint_furnace.greeting: Uh... Hi there. Good morning.#$b#I noticed that you've been breaking some rocks open and finding ore. That's good!
event.clint_furnace.need_furnace: If you want to get the most out of the ores you find, you'll need a furnace.
event.clint_furnace.blueprints: Just so happens I had an extra set of blueprints lying around. Here, I want you to have them.
event.clint_furnace.explanation: The furnace allows you to smelt metal bars. The bars can be used for crafting, construction, and tool upgrades.
event.clint_furnace.goodbye: When you've smelted a few copper bars, consider having me upgrade one of your tools. It can make your work a lot easier.#$b#Well, okay. I'm heading home. Take it easy.
event.demetrius_cave.greeting: Hi @! I have some good news for you.
event.demetrius_cave.breakthrough: A few days ago I made a breakthrough in my research on the local environment.
event.demetrius_cave.empty_cave: I'll spare you the technical details and get to the point... You know that empty cave you have, over in the cliffs?
event.demetrius_cave.proposal: Well, I have a way to turn it into something useful... for both of us.
event.demetrius_cave.offer_choice: I'd like to set up the cave to attract some local species. I can either set it up to attract mushrooms or fruit bats. The bats will sometimes leave fruit for you to collect.
event.demetrius_cave.question: Which would you prefer?
event.demetrius_cave.confirm_bats: Fruit bats it is! I'll go set it up right away.
event.demetrius_cave.confirm_mushrooms: Mushrooms it is! I'll go set it up right away.
event.demetrius_cave.goodbye: Alright! It shouldn't take any time at all.#$b#Thanks for letting me do this.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_9.desc:
A premium scarecrow combining all rarecrow styles.
Protection radius: 17 tiles.
